name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh3njeinok7g8d191k3g0f5caelqad26j0hamhkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg6co32chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvsmt2qg7ppfq6e60oj6mngjhkekqg3tjs2gnqho_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg6co32chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmkv2k2r8mr1vh9ndahc8d40utdr01g72eo2esj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg6co32chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z7iqljpfcbfd7pqquhhkd3lu4kocb52fum1ngnbg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjahd30f97lb2bgf87b2iue94msibbadghultq68_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg6co32chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Sharing this big news with you personally, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
I wanted to share the official news with you personally, friend:
**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important.**
The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.
But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.
**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, friend. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**
**[Please, will you split $5 or more between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57308406/387528605/9428118?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2320-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmZlNjZmYy0xMDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sni5gQLlasewA7S_anx4NPgU4kTocAKO5HFz6k4iFzA=)**
I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.
But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a _permanent_ paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.
**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.** **[Please, friend, will you split $5 or more between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57308409/387528606/9428118?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2320-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmZlNjZmYy0xMDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sni5gQLlasewA7S_anx4NPgU4kTocAKO5HFz6k4iFzA=)**
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Kirsten Gillibrand and Jacky Rosen:__ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57308411/387528607/9428118?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk2320-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmZlNjZmYy0xMDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sni5gQLlasewA7S_anx4NPgU4kTocAKO5HFz6k4iFzA=)

Thank you,

Kirsten

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z51nkp30ncgbu9bvkltfjc1072ren5f9om73gmi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg6co32chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrnndnpd56m2egg2978rfa4i2flspkqvnte53j6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg6co32chh2bs)_

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcmhgut8gd4lqk3akrte2uclpq98spf84vkva4dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg6co32chh2bs)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

name: Great America Update
subject: What do you think about higher education today?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7533%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=spqWtVee%2bKZosUuWqr3euA&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78698%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BFhklEtcA8Mbok3zJByYKA&sysid=1)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78699%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5WdztBmaUVfomuFvawau%2fA&sysid=1) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78690%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hjG7AqmqWH11cTLzuitJ1Q&sysid=1) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7533%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=spqWtVee%2bKZosUuWqr3euA&sysid=1)

This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? I am deeply grateful for your friendship. Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

body:

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6r3i8a0t4aq42a7d02c60d1c81lrvl7n4vuu2g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg62o74c9h2bs) Dear Friend,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpvnri0jj3tjfqha0suoh40kd90p5u9ss2lr348g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg62o74c9h2bs)

I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqvqp93p3nh7q144lglotvfihpnhv8bjkp9d3epg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg62o74c9h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2za0dttipf8e88bgj807dgkoqqvbp5ckdseit3ldg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg62o74c9h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Friend, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrn4hi3m68ec1p3gg3ngj9cuuqp3mpbdd9n86ng8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg62o74c9h2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z89847163fipbm89gggkq3as4hpvij1r0gkbe3r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg62o76chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze8h2gue05qovtrov64ov1m9g9pvl8u26qttbig8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg62o76chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsnmem2g5tdkc247ubm54a3v3ui3bp9nsfik2hkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg62o76chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2s2nigoi96cmh11seuh7700ut0iv102eohicp5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctg62o76chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: National Gun Owner
subject: Increase your accuracy in seconds…
body:
Between you and me, my only regret is not getting one sooner!...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11248/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/d68e68b1cf264d0e13190d2464b196ecef8db618). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11248/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/d68e68b1cf264d0e13190d2464b196ecef8db618?message_id=ImE0ODA5Y2QwLTc2NDgtMDEzYi05M2JkLTQyMDEwYTgwMDA0ZkBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| |
---
---
|
---
Gun Lover,
Hold on to your britches, because I have some **insider news** that I need to share with you...
It’s about the red-dot laser that has _absolutely changed the game_ for me.
When I tell you this thing replaced my Bushnell, I’m serious... After all, who wants to waste money on posh brands when these hold up next to the competition any day?
“What laser”, you say? I’m talking’ about the best-selling, [Black Ops Tactical Laser Sight](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11248/6374453/8d9bdcfda0083ed37bcd504b8c68ffa75e787c07/d68e68b1cf264d0e13190d2464b196ecef8db618) by Gunner Gear.
Based on American sniper technology, this ultra-precision laser will speed up your aiming time like **nothing I’ve seen** and can be installed faster than green grass through a goose. What’s even better is with the fire-tempted aluminum framework, it fits practically **any firearm** in my collection. Between you and me, my only regret is not getting one sooner!
For less than 40 USD, I know that these things will be flying off the shelves...
So, you want my two cents? RUN – don’t walk, to grab your [tactical laser sight](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11248/6374453/8d9bdcfda0083ed37bcd504b8c68ffa75e787c07/d68e68b1cf264d0e13190d2464b196ecef8db618) today.
You’ll thank me later!
In Good Faith,
P.S - Don’t make the same mistake I did and blow money on an overrated Bushnell or Vortex...the Black Ops laser sight is a _fraction_ of the price and can hold its own, trust me.

[>> GET YOUR BLACK OPS LASER SIGHT HERE (+ FREE S & H)! ](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11248/6374453/8d9bdcfda0083ed37bcd504b8c68ffa75e787c07/d68e68b1cf264d0e13190d2464b196ecef8db618)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: We have the tools and the moral imperative to end child poverty in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
For millions of kids across the country, we have to extend the Child Tax Credit permanently. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57320821/387559528/286686063?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTEzNjNkNy0xZjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HNX6adsFrR3Mjr38qUQjOPVeTghB8VupFKgiawJDtnk=&emci=801363d7-1f94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=851363d7-1f94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1295540) Folks — In January 1964, in his first State of the Union Address, President Lyndon B. Johnson laid out a vision to eradicate poverty in America. In the richest nation on Earth, he declared, we cannot afford to let vast swaths of our nation languish, unable to meet their most basic needs. The plans he introduced that night led to the creation of some of the most important social programs in America today: Medicare, Medicaid, food assistance, and federal support for schools and employment programs. This week — almost forty-nine years to the day since that address — I reflected on the fight to end poverty as I visited TGTHR, an organization in Boulder working to combat youth homelessness in Colorado. Across Colorado and our country, advocates are doing incredible work to lift folks out of poverty, but there’s still so much more to be done. **I believe, like President Johnson did, that we have the tools and the moral imperative to end poverty in America, and I believe that work should start with our children.** [**If you’re with me, please sign my petition calling on Congress to reinstate the expanded _Child Tax Credit_ as soon as possible. We can and must strive to end childhood poverty in the richest nation on earth.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57320822/387559529/286686063?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTEzNjNkNy0xZjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HNX6adsFrR3Mjr38qUQjOPVeTghB8VupFKgiawJDtnk=&emci=801363d7-1f94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=851363d7-1f94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1295540) | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57320823/387559530/1573765503?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTEzNjNkNy0xZjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HNX6adsFrR3Mjr38qUQjOPVeTghB8VupFKgiawJDtnk=&emci=801363d7-1f94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=851363d7-1f94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)**
---
When we temporarily expanded the _Child Tax Credit_ (CTC) in 2021, we cut child poverty nearly in HALF; reduced hunger by a QUARTER; and enabled hardworking parents all over the country to pay for expenses like school supplies, rent, and more.
Unfortunately, Congress did not make the CTC permanent in 2022, and child poverty has risen as a result.
Permanently expanding the _Child Tax Credit_ will provide historic relief working for families in Colorado and across the country. It will help parents get their kids out of poverty.
**Friend, we don't have to accept child poverty as a chronic condition of our economy and our democracy. I will continue to fight for the _Child Tax Credit_ and work towards ending child poverty in this country.**
[**If you’re with me, please add your name to my petition today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57320824/387559531/286686063?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTEzNjNkNy0xZjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HNX6adsFrR3Mjr38qUQjOPVeTghB8VupFKgiawJDtnk=&emci=801363d7-1f94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=851363d7-1f94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1295540)
Thank you,
Michael

clean_body: For millions of kids across the country, we have to extend the Child Tax Credit permanently. | Folks — In January 1964, in his first State of the Union Address, President Lyndon B. Johnson laid out a vision to eradicate poverty in America. In the richest nation on Earth, he declared, we cannot afford to let vast swaths of our nation languish, unable to meet their most basic needs. The plans he introduced that night led to the creation of some of the most important social programs in America today: Medicare, Medicaid, food assistance, and federal support for schools and employment programs. This week — almost forty-nine years to the day since that address — I reflected on the fight to end poverty as I visited TGTHR, an organization in Boulder working to combat youth homelessness in Colorado. Across Colorado and our country, advocates are doing incredible work to lift folks out of poverty, but there’s still so much more to be done. I believe, like President Johnson did, that we have the tools and the moral imperative to end poverty in America, and I believe that work should start with our children. | When we temporarily expanded the Child Tax Credit (CTC) in 2021, we cut child poverty nearly in HALF; reduced hunger by a QUARTER; and enabled hardworking parents all over the country to pay for expenses like school supplies, rent, and more. Unfortunately, Congress did not make the CTC permanent in 2022, and child poverty has risen as a result. Permanently expanding the Child Tax Credit will provide historic relief working for families in Colorado and across the country. It will help parents get their kids out of poverty. Friend, we don't have to accept child poverty as a chronic condition of our economy and our democracy. I will continue to fight for the Child Tax Credit and work towards ending child poverty in this country. Thank you, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7745%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=yqbuVq25I0BDGTO57E7x2Q&sysid=1)

| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92551%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AqpBF1JYzwu58RCph%2bfh2Q&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today’s young people don’t understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it’s being introduced to them.

That’s why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _[“The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism.”](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92552%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fGHOb3blH7JAiWvsl2%2fiyQ&sysid=1)_
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JDOZFDcJiC8220IJ3C4TOg&sysid=1)
---
| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92554%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BtmSse2NPGXF7xVeiMjMmA&sysid=1)

Inside this eBook, you’ll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you’ll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you’re concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation’s youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92565%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oIL3zHlROPM8FnaMf1g1sA&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6b4253aeec94758b3a5753a572d5d4e&_e=a2JgMI4IW0ieFhamar7ohYhliS80LHJRBeY8hfKds5XMVqsQ5q6e1RxCpvyjymmp8AaGp35_9lwaxa9DO8KmPlh3IbTaLk1utLgEgrtspq5ShVbxqpdyIKDX2QBJR1FDYXjj3J1jgGbvU0qm-13aS3rZE-7lv6zkt1Pg3VrfYSGYHy8JV3qLhD0aM3QLqQvrd1NreTyhtZo9l8zjYJ91ID6rCEEwczJvEDsud2zBaQ-amIQfCfwllrLI5HnWFojyBfcACdNXXXLg7Mr0g2mPbmO78Y6Zf8uz28Faw7T6buhLyJYzQLqRn0M4GYq7vc4atxXTnjmE8vJveMmRSJhIXzLjgYzWyujQCOmIg-RkQ_4BzpiIlNPuHjcmxSnhlshxDPTWR-pGm1CykWJ0ycDGnptUhUGWx69i_77VZmpYCK8NwKRyxbO5-v0_SxMng511)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6b4253aeec94758b3a5753a572d5d4e&_e=a2JgMI4IW0ieFhamar7ohYhliS80LHJRBeY8hfKds5XMVqsQ5q6e1RxCpvyjymmp8AaGp35_9lwaxa9DO8KmPlh3IbTaLk1utLgEgrtspq5ShVbxqpdyIKDX2QBJR1FDYXjj3J1jgGbvU0qm-13aS3rZE-7lv6zkt1Pg3VrfYSGYHy8JV3qLhD0aM3QLqQvrd1NreTyhtZo9l8zjYJ91ID6rCEEwczJvEDsud2zBaQ-amIQfCfwllrLI5HnWFojyBfcACdNXXXLg7Mr0g2mPbjQq30OAngTaMsD5fBldoAfznoCrzlwobcwXKIXaUulq4WX0tk-rg5EdYokPsskhdSgVLGnu00Dyef8SsYK07BML-yZiqNJ_UPKXYVS6VY-sWEpkCG-pVr6Z46pO6ZaJl67eIqPH0fRHew5LzGMAPIILvem1Da9IQu6TPw0FSvcy)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6b4253aeec94758b3a5753a572d5d4e&_e=a2JgMI4IW0ieFhamar7ohYhliS80LHJRBeY8hfKds5XMVqsQ5q6e1RxCpvyjymmp8AaGp35_9lwaxa9DO8KmPlh3IbTaLk1utLgEgrtspq5ShVbxqpdyIKDX2QBJR1FDYXjj3J1jgGbvU0qm-13aS3rZE-7lv6zkt1Pg3VrfYSGYHy8JV3qLhD0aM3QLqQvrd1NreTyhtZo9l8zjYJ91ID6rCEEwczJvEDsud2zBaQ-amIQfCfwllrLI5HnWFojyBfcACdNXXXLg7Mr0g2mPbtRGgU4SJZc1S0cJHCFPW47aMe1nkFqUdfcIjQPzn93tInwofuQTejtvNdRuQrOgvGUCDPCNn0UN1n4Aarj0FqqRfkweRVmWHddP0A3pZcWfQd1TCQ6VnEoRXfHqup6tnywoTNHjyNyyyakDGcjgUQbzidJhKWXsJ2cFUopp5lpV)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6b4253aeec94758b3a5753a572d5d4e&_e=a2JgMI4IW0ieFhamar7ohYhliS80LHJRBeY8hfKds5XMVqsQ5q6e1RxCpvyjymmp8AaGp35_9lwaxa9DO8KmPlh3IbTaLk1utLgEgrtspq5ShVbxqpdyIKDX2QBJR1FDYXjj3J1jgGbvU0qm-13aS3rZE-7lv6zkt1Pg3VrfYSGYHy8JV3qLhD0aM3QLqQvrd1NreTyhtZo9l8zjYJ91ID6rCEEwczJvEDsud2zBaQ-amIQfCfwllrLI5HnWFojyBfcACdNXXXLg7Mr0g2mPbhYMRDTQkVymCavh2FeqvNVlzfSVu0pQ6nt2C7zJYL5H79tJSzIHfrAb2M94tC5YynK4VZf8moDcuiXYOuy27Spp0zFTYktRIZFIfd3Jrt2QWKzqZM0S53G29L6oESBEnyv4xCcYaHK5b0DBEh674Csu0oHJftkTvrS6KdNulJ7y).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c7c80e262692427f8223db67383aeb93&_e=ITHjJiIuW9HcEvO7dmnnqSzGDy0uZ9c_hTBrbmvgcpwrsedQ5p3H4z6IxfpE644MK2SFAFhV0Krdxm_EaeaV_2UelkWOMlNzOgFQJYe5QDNn_JQgFxWhJw13YLnRm-T8TD_CvWgft8ImlXpszhH2xohYHUrVbBpuIeyh9W_ahRdweDmC5ooIQUmTv0iR9gTGXaJbIYz9TM7Ea-kKjaxTUfeiW73dFGJfxKoagfwik28H1q73C1dlR0yvk9R-u-4ursFNNmSGmlO1oU31yVxG1rRSfuYYTe4Ph996KW6Ez50YrtTlHAeOrKRfiRdvzV-Qbk979JyQIvrlvmeIddW_Gq_VlIDGD4Y88O7qr7v0XWB6w10y43hRl2CM_vNEdn9XVH5_Jy5_M-YlDyfJWt9tiQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, "**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**."

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c7c80e262692427f8223db67383aeb93&_e=ITHjJiIuW9HcEvO7dmnnqSzGDy0uZ9c_hTBrbmvgcpwrsedQ5p3H4z6IxfpE644MK2SFAFhV0Krdxm_EaeaV_2UelkWOMlNzOgFQJYe5QDNn_JQgFxWhJw13YLnRm-T8TD_CvWgft8ImlXpszhH2xohYHUrVbBpuIeyh9W_ahRdweDmC5ooIQUmTv0iR9gTGXaJbIYz9TM7Ea-kKjaxTUfeiW73dFGJfxKoagfwik28H1q73C1dlR0yvk9R-u-4uWZsB5Drub6bursEHUUGfSY2z2eF2lQpn2n-t1Z9SJ7uH9MMt6iVPfuRUIoHtNIfBxx_Hk82FYqUgOAor3rwNI-7pai9HxsG4Z3x_GZ4Yc9qoaty7AMfeGs8BnKntXj0Qvfah6vui_W7K0rxNw7psGQ%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87e636914a2f415faee91fa8fb04cc8f&_e=9IhcEeIMoZArQeHQwYDRLT9b3X0vEND_jBf0zHxMCScU8LwdCSUNFuoiPJXJqFz8hTV3UT9L-8Ct-bJDNXvqYy4SjzHpAW6inG25RE8cpefam3ppIsrqKBJNUFe068k7wdyhr_6Apl9eS2s0-GvcYuW6N7fqpYo16lWJETIZIpbJhwmVnq6WUMgPBeUIce00Vbj4PXRVOVj2RnkFQ4BsnMXyHbgMByaAl8-tYEKYk5AABScK8ro8_iKNAsdTiPKi5_2mXeGgg_Yv3Zgh5c1PpXlvTJmUeLaltoHc0YZ3GtB87yhYW3hG-2KsSCT5vkSna66eQ04KZgl4NXEWFFkwlZUr4iWbFY9i_nGr0pL0b12ZQT3NmTRVS2xiftPFb-GW2Ly_xbSssAQ8ViGNT6FY8g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87e636914a2f415faee91fa8fb04cc8f&_e=9IhcEeIMoZArQeHQwYDRLT9b3X0vEND_jBf0zHxMCScU8LwdCSUNFuoiPJXJqFz8hTV3UT9L-8Ct-bJDNXvqYy4SjzHpAW6inG25RE8cpefam3ppIsrqKBJNUFe068k7wdyhr_6Apl9eS2s0-GvcYuW6N7fqpYo16lWJETIZIpbJhwmVnq6WUMgPBeUIce00Vbj4PXRVOVj2RnkFQ4BsnMXyHbgMByaAl8-tYEKYk5Chmy5fr6sxPqbOXaogO09JscKmDJyBi7Vo6GODMu_Mwy4TmXFvz2vLlzyaTBDX7_LuiDRjF41gRtXlAjUvbhlxdz7Z_BAT0gUUmqyxRIEYkxAqFR_-fBdtY8545id7aFjhNg0I3BTKvODz5dGntTp-4esV1SImDEH4olKmIi9V5A%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87e636914a2f415faee91fa8fb04cc8f&_e=9IhcEeIMoZArQeHQwYDRLT9b3X0vEND_jBf0zHxMCScU8LwdCSUNFuoiPJXJqFz8hTV3UT9L-8Ct-bJDNXvqYy4SjzHpAW6inG25RE8cpefam3ppIsrqKBJNUFe068k7wdyhr_6Apl9eS2s0-GvcYuW6N7fqpYo16lWJETIZIpbJhwmVnq6WUMgPBeUIce00Vbj4PXRVOVj2RnkFQ4BsnMXyHbgMByaAl8-tYEKYk5ASQ1vojEf0JgiGQBL_mo5NOLVvYJ4gRcmT5QWxZ_tiv0xvCaQ_rpo6M-K8Htl594nG3MhDL2ui_osdiJnXP28Y8CdQkVrH4haoSC_n-CkNin-Z6LpMwy7OLBN-ClZZ9Mh_GOsICdYHITwNNe5SCDRixVyBpUvj6TBPkZMBNYyWPQ%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. [**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f71c0a81488b4368a1b6a10e5eab4880&_e=SozrtKhKoBDsYB0N4qlLD8x8OihddOUaxYlFS5zU_TvoyC6l3lyMxaEgpsLUQavOboYOcmOJjyFI0Ns3wU5MZfsUOeDpViqqZ9G9xH10yiNTs2IYXMR0k2zdevsd3PazeQDk-m8JBkGu4cB9kRN4hvwnL_6-Jt4uwDq6qTmuPHO2zC5CFKklZh1_qMAudFMpmfd4E6Z_kovLpSUD0avgzTi02tiqbObhX87ky5vDE7vWQtR8xnU7ZYDi9YemCVuLFWo6cx6JRVJ64YQpTSsQLIr7Vasb71EBkbV-xc1EtwVOsuxR7bNGFgMYnlb7Gj5R824URYcWU3Yl1OngDpFiMg%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f71c0a81488b4368a1b6a10e5eab4880&_e=SozrtKhKoBDsYB0N4qlLD8x8OihddOUaxYlFS5zU_TvoyC6l3lyMxaEgpsLUQavOboYOcmOJjyFI0Ns3wU5MZfsUOeDpViqqZ9G9xH10yiNTs2IYXMR0k2zdevsd3PazeQDk-m8JBkGu4cB9kRN4hvwnL_6-Jt4uwDq6qTmuPHO2zC5CFKklZh1_qMAudFMpAoeg_whqev2vpoxcMl6htDjd92T0wMDZtChpe33agCeJXBJrdllSqXi6MLLYjkTt9ZZc3QlcVh-HuHRPUjAQ2gIEzSnU_PELufG2FQjJJjJjqRlFiwpjSXelOoZKPG1gp_RO-Pkv5DRJVXd3RXe6AA%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f71c0a81488b4368a1b6a10e5eab4880&_e=SozrtKhKoBDsYB0N4qlLD8x8OihddOUaxYlFS5zU_TvoyC6l3lyMxaEgpsLUQavOboYOcmOJjyFI0Ns3wU5MZfsUOeDpViqqZ9G9xH10yiNTs2IYXMR0k2zdevsd3PazeQDk-m8JBkGu4cB9kRN4hvwnL_6-Jt4uwDq6qTmuPHO2zC5CFKklZh1_qMAudFMpV_xs1qwRH4wZzNXfourA128DpDSsts20IVuUgxoYwrpLomdPi8hMhq2lm7qVVsrCJnFBtr2lTSipXCkeDIl3b23XdCQCHAWZBYvbEYGj9iWKdjBYu8OpGd3pWETFAsmP2QTfzIxMUMpVl3SrHQnDTQ%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f71c0a81488b4368a1b6a10e5eab4880&_e=SozrtKhKoBDsYB0N4qlLD8x8OihddOUaxYlFS5zU_TvoyC6l3lyMxaEgpsLUQavOboYOcmOJjyFI0Ns3wU5MZfsUOeDpViqqZ9G9xH10yiNTs2IYXMR0k2zdevsd3PazeQDk-m8JBkGu4cB9kRN4hvwnL_6-Jt4uwDq6qTmuPHO2zC5CFKklZh1_qMAudFMpZ-sTsrUXTSqfcNOyJKewI4hwF7sMYm62lm-HhzyZNjGZcFafBGPFer3T_XCCoBbV16qO4T6r4d_xsua83yGulv1Gagx4q0PUMhvvo-QTCUHWcCAct_mtXPq6-wib7EsbLQfzjtJNhHFBfbi_T7yjGw%3D%3D)

subject: Medical Freedom for All

Turns out the COVID jab IS dangerous!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ot-p_Dsa_NBefMQUiqVRqYIJ-KEtiCdz8noBqye4vNeQDGxVDgVawitZOAWEHNyXNOPwIcZM9WpftWgyRrghSx9FPC_idovKgQ0b8NUBwEzsoN-5YxYwaLPA2kVB9ZZwxGMZTSGWeiZV1LDH324nA3W9fCb3YWncTos8p9OXVdONQ1ohwGq_0N_UsW_i-rMc45bbAvZEL11acnAkA7qQRfe0X3HXpIyWb1YuaM4N1Zf0IEyg4iM84aijV8fpBqgB686f6X97fXzPXkT1Zkzw6r2irVqQUtH2xjqoZOBsHaBTZ7lZXoODZTSBd9hi2DauZe_Un4J4XHGEgLKb_iDlc6EpHDKy2TZN&c=vcARX2viGrhWxZu10X_d7i_wWuc0wrhvSvKekHltI1Ob2-epYoacFg==&ch=VdR2qF5ygxLq6MZQv_uJnxAbokzik369XkZtyyED-ZyCX91Vfcl4Yg==)
---
| Peter \-
Just yesterday, the CDC announced that the Pfizer COVID vaccine can lead to increased risk of stroke in adults who've received the shot.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ot-p_Dsa_NBefMQUiqVRqYIJ-KEtiCdz8noBqye4vNeQDGxVDgVawitZOAWEHNyXdXmxDffVD5A5oE1ObYGyGBz4h8Kp3M8fm0ZnwmIKk37RW37fIQmKvB-yXC6WSC5ogVHHHbBTO-VTt7ug7oaBIouDocbmT_K5s40iNc0BC_x5Ztl2MrA1fYjajNz9TfGr8VkdaSXyVheSwyvWxvInH6i2YXvSS_Dpiwy_TTDRoYZQB9CzAwawDnkK47sKtRZE0JlQRnJw_fn51EcgK78P88hr0FJqmJBPSb-kVYgfsisNq-ZTPiHJHoSgWJrVYje_4Q76kJ1Wm12_1oPI8MjGS0IyygQglGlQ&c=vcARX2viGrhWxZu10X_d7i_wWuc0wrhvSvKekHltI1Ob2-epYoacFg==&ch=VdR2qF5ygxLq6MZQv_uJnxAbokzik369XkZtyyED-ZyCX91Vfcl4Yg==)
---
When I ran for Congress, I spoke to THOUSANDS of people across New Jersey, and one issue came up time and time again: medical freedom.
During my campaign, I made it clear that I would fight tirelessly to make sure that vaccines are NEVER mandated for you, your children, or any American citizen. Every American has the right to choose what they do or do not put into their bodies.
Now, it's becoming increasingly clear that the medical freedom advocates were correct about the tyrannical COVID vaccine mandates: they're dangerous.
I'm continuing my fight for medical freedom by working to elect true conservative leaders here in New Jersey who will give medical choice BACK to the people.
Will you chip in today to help us defend medical freedom in New Jersey?
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY TO HELP ELECT LEADERS WHO WILL PROTECT MEDICAL FREEDOM!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ot-p_Dsa_NBefMQUiqVRqYIJ-KEtiCdz8noBqye4vNeQDGxVDgVawitZOAWEHNyXGfipFj2A8meAL-OBwb30XqDNG4tYgTwEHoxov6MI39eBkZkRM2NeghAQqOSifqi1N3karZuCC40Hlk8PaFVD94Wfhyox3lkiB2L0svAF1CRYj4tvfVvTtjWE5qNkGqkln51hwriOqjdIm0zFADhdV_0kJalLbKR5iVIx0kHL_OF2gRv6G8vZpOvqYxO6n_wZJpGYc9lH00Nv-KcRa5fqqHF7D0JyS-bIqRrz04F54rqzfXqcgt6-U0jGM03xofAWhy-pb1nwdAGQNpmiyM4X0XbsGXvP9SM-&c=vcARX2viGrhWxZu10X_d7i_wWuc0wrhvSvKekHltI1Ob2-epYoacFg==&ch=VdR2qF5ygxLq6MZQv_uJnxAbokzik369XkZtyyED-ZyCX91Vfcl4Yg==)

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ee53d1d6e0047949083687d522dea48&_e=lvRImSGpDAADmZeU-tRSA643ymWjSOut5ASZoaAjzrI2wiznCki2lgy5Vdwk_dGITXreH77epO6sWA9_1PC9oXIGMqhj5YV_AkLm3aiQhMU2miCjjP_3CDaCax6ObmHiKuno6GiYaGBN1ZweRT2lPKOhFag_fLPcKvyMS7aNSBI-6emNTjeKizxsfGtLzw8Yj0qA8dJYzaWGo-yLEcusWyKN96b7A2yti9dFi8WLt0ItHrojkbewbxNL_M2QYD6egLDVrNwVBizr93nFiGUNH_jDuCtHqpeXyQsnkUGqurpxkzYHQQS9bvrQNh6q1rf6a4laDejb8CR8WaRSLX_YoiBI7PDEXEWg_1ES5HzBZTU%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ee53d1d6e0047949083687d522dea48&_e=lvRImSGpDAADmZeU-tRSA643ymWjSOut5ASZoaAjzrI2wiznCki2lgy5Vdwk_dGITXreH77epO6sWA9_1PC9oXIGMqhj5YV_AkLm3aiQhMU2miCjjP_3CDaCax6ObmHiKuno6GiYaGBN1ZweRT2lPKOhFag_fLPcKvyMS7aNSBI-6emNTjeKizxsfGtLzw8Yj0qA8dJYzaWGo-yLEcusW4h3NLDGMsFlkNoYVXFNFuQtAvkuMhNA8i5OuuFC__eqplpHnpz8E1MLN7RiDEFaQU2KvW10Fo6N1MmOCDPLQJ4xmnaZtgHMNdE7Deuzcz_Q5lIwZUDcA9uglvXYViAAB_-7wCYvc-1u4ZviFauKSc4%3D)_
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ee53d1d6e0047949083687d522dea48&_e=lvRImSGpDAADmZeU-tRSA643ymWjSOut5ASZoaAjzrI2wiznCki2lgy5Vdwk_dGITXreH77epO6sWA9_1PC9oXIGMqhj5YV_AkLm3aiQhMU2miCjjP_3CDaCax6ObmHiKuno6GiYaGBN1ZweRT2lPKOhFag_fLPcKvyMS7aNSBI-6emNTjeKizxsfGtLzw8Yj0qA8dJYzaWGo-yLEcusW0Rpi6wIV0dzBiYEMdXqM7Je3OBhIWHvhCbbeL8E5b3JcDuoauFuR3S470MtypF8VU0K2vPaHIX8A06KTeHyll2ZOgLGIMOrhZzPdTR4XobAxVQd6p95ve7H-nX9cxWQ55JHmahY7NO1a0LI6xbrnFo%3D)
---
| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ee53d1d6e0047949083687d522dea48&_e=lvRImSGpDAADmZeU-tRSA643ymWjSOut5ASZoaAjzrI2wiznCki2lgy5Vdwk_dGITXreH77epO6sWA9_1PC9oXIGMqhj5YV_AkLm3aiQhMU2miCjjP_3CDaCax6ObmHiKuno6GiYaGBN1ZweRT2lPKOhFag_fLPcKvyMS7aNSBI-6emNTjeKizxsfGtLzw8Yj0qA8dJYzaWGo-yLEcusWwwxcstlqpYBA2pVG4DgBIqQugVxn9JkEk5MfIbdFzV7QqW5qgAu2_zf0dHqYLbEX_kTFjmF7B16uCvYuczn85q_jNWvVfvkhaWMhlwWrCc-0TuaWnG7ojOKH_NRGyQJNFXzDFHSkJy6F67x55wjDGg%3D)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ee53d1d6e0047949083687d522dea48&_e=lvRImSGpDAADmZeU-tRSA643ymWjSOut5ASZoaAjzrI2wiznCki2lgy5Vdwk_dGITXreH77epO6sWA9_1PC9oXIGMqhj5YV_AkLm3aiQhMU2miCjjP_3CDaCax6ObmHiKuno6GiYaGBN1ZweRT2lPKOhFag_fLPcKvyMS7aNSBI-6emNTjeKizxsfGtLzw8Yj0qA8dJYzaWGo-yLEcusW-tanz4NX3Uw6XgkWzoSfm36A8VV7JXm6MIeOi-I9SLHOObgR1-ZgQ71fqWcMzvKC4eohtKoalVyi9FG3RLyToyp5DMIUaepYrhGqJGrZdnLZHH_KXG0OZooMMQWjRuTKls50O_JuiixDAz_lWgUyOI%3D)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack

Founder, Libertas Institute

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Explaining our campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just $10 right now -- split with Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Look – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win.
My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding will come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.
Will you please give $10 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Serve America, and I’d be grateful for anything you can give. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off.
Thank you for your help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Mia Bonta
subject: Vote for UNITY & Return your Ballot TODAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973
body:
Hi community,
The wait is over – ADEM Delegate ballots are arriving THIS week! With your vote, we can help elect the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate as the next AD-18 California Democratic Party Assembly District Delegates! The process of filling out your ballot and casting your vote can be a bit confusing, so here’s a simplified breakdown.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/ballot%20teps.png]
Step 1: Open your ballot and locate your Voter PIN. When you registered to receive a ballot online, you received an email confirmation from the CADEM with a 10-digit Participant ID Number (PIN). Fill in your unique PIN on the front side of your ballot, writing out each digit on the top line, and bubbling in the corresponding number in each column.
Step 2: Vote for all 14 Progressive & Labor Unity Slate candidates. You can vote for up to, but no more than 14 candidates. Each candidate on the Unity Slate is committed to ensuring that the Democratic party works for the many, not just the few; furthering issues such as housing affordability, climate resiliency, access to healthcare and public education.
There are no names on your ballot. To vote for the Unity Slate candidates, bubble in their respective numbers. Here’s a shortcut with their number placements on the ballot:
#1 – Zac Bowling
#5 – Mayra Alvarado
#6 – Carlotta Brown
#7 – Victor Flores
#8 – Doug Bloch
#9 – Courtney Welch
#10 – Fay Eastman
#13 – Jada Taylor Folse
#14 – Renia Webb
#19 – Ivan Garcia
#21 – Rowena Brown
#22 – Alex Randolph
#23 – Seth Steward
#28 – Kevin Jenkins
Step 3: Return your ballot before January 25th. Ballots must be received by January 31st to be counted, don’t delay in sending yours in! Using the included return envelope, seal your ballot, and make sure to attach a postage stamp for delivery. You can also return your ballot at any in-person voting location, which can be found here. [https://www.adem.cadem.org/where-to-vote]
If you missed the deadline to register to vote by mail, you can still vote in-person on Saturday, January 21st! Below are two of the nearest locations to AD-18 where you can cast your vote! Full list of in-person voting locations can be found here. [https://www.adem.cadem.org/where-to-vote]
Hayward, CA
When: 1/21 10am-2pm
Where: 29475 Mission Blvd Hayward, California 94544
LiUNA Laborers Local 304
Albany, CA
When: 1/21 1pm-5pm
Where: 1259 Brighton Ave Albany, California 94706, United States Albany Middle School Lunch Room

clean_body: Hi community, The wait is over – ADEM Delegate ballots are arriving THIS week! With your vote, we can help elect the Progressive & Labor Unity Slate as the next AD-18 California Democratic Party Assembly District Delegates! The process of filling out your ballot and casting your vote can be a bit confusing, so here’s a simplified breakdown. [] Step 1: Open your ballot and locate your Voter PIN. When you registered to receive a ballot online, you received an email confirmation from the CADEM with a 10-digit Participant ID Number (PIN). Fill in your unique PIN on the front side of your ballot, writing out each digit on the top line, and bubbling in the corresponding number in each column. Step 2: Vote for all 14 Progressive & Labor Unity Slate candidates. You can vote for up to, but no more than 14 candidates. Each candidate on the Unity Slate is committed to ensuring that the Democratic party works for the many, not just the few; furthering issues such as housing affordability, climate resiliency, access to healthcare and public education. There are no names on your ballot. To vote for the Unity Slate candidates, bubble in their respective numbers. Here’s a shortcut with their number placements on the ballot: #1 – Zac Bowling #5 – Mayra Alvarado #6 – Carlotta Brown #7 – Victor Flores #8 – Doug Bloch #9 – Courtney Welch #10 – Fay Eastman #13 – Jada Taylor Folse #14 – Renia Webb #19 – Ivan Garcia #21 – Rowena Brown #22 – Alex Randolph #23 – Seth Steward #28 – Kevin Jenkins Step 3: Return your ballot before January 25th. Ballots must be received by January 31st to be counted, don’t delay in sending yours in! Using the included return envelope, seal your ballot, and make sure to attach a postage stamp for delivery. You can also return your ballot at any in-person voting location, which can be found here. [] If you missed the deadline to register to vote by mail, you can still vote in-person on Saturday, January 21st! Below are two of the nearest locations to AD-18 where you can cast your vote! Full list of in-person voting locations can be found here. [] Hayward, CA When: 1/21 10am-2pm Where: 29475 Mission Blvd Hayward, California 94544 LiUNA Laborers Local 304 Albany, CA When: 1/21 1pm-5pm Where: 1259 Brighton Ave Albany, California 94706, United States Albany Middle School Lunch Room I’ll say it one more time: every vote counts. This is a small, obscure election, and your vote will make all the difference. Join me in voting for working class people, diverse representation, and unity across our East Bay community! If you encounter any issues when voting or have specific questions, contact the CA Democratic Party via email at adem@cadem.org [adem@cadem.org] . Peter, Great news: A federal appeals court **BLOCKED** the Biden Adminstration's attempt to [**_force religious doctors and hospitals to provide dangerous "gender-affirming" care_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c04393b4044c4677b47c54fbd9e5e8ee&_e=pXEyLQTPNBEJQY7fmZIPdFBRTyWcvk2DvFVfDchP08QV4XBvcaKfhrTApeNIklpFtLfGuEXfcDrGlRWUcS5C6b-F0OWG54hvzzxnFfPnkSaAesMyxSBVD9-38V38oo46USd_quO02k3BCZuiCoq1vtlo3HfiZI1xZ06O1IabreJRY_bU_BT32pYaSmy264kgzmi8LvqH4nnGt6bFZysK0EHDavIueYX1d_iqt8lkWCNloyT3JrRHCIu2b1XV5h2gaC_kDPtraYganwUZiW9OdM9abmIMw8AQ6JaSa6IMr2CX3BKfadhPdMV9Qi1pLKz3AeKkpzVO8eVL-Weh0P6bMYVcPKDhnApU90cp5BNvjIxRG91DcgmC2GxD0ZUEN3ImMwz79RFDp3Yd-w9Taxl4QhszXGsNM8ZoG84-f_0-7ko%3D) to people identifying as transgender. This was the second court ruling to push back on the Biden Administration's attempt to force medical providers to violate their deeply held beliefs in the name of leftist ideology. Here's the truth: **Conservatives had some major victories in 2022: **
* Overturning _Roe v. Wade. _
* Blocking OSHA's unconstitutional vaccine mandate.
* And now fighting back on the Biden Administration's push for far-left gender ideology.

You might notice a pattern: **these BIG wins for conservatives keep coming from the courts.**
---
[**SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE COURTS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c04393b4044c4677b47c54fbd9e5e8ee&_e=pXEyLQTPNBEJQY7fmZIPdFBRTyWcvk2DvFVfDchP08QV4XBvcaKfhrTApeNIklpFtLfGuEXfcDrGlRWUcS5C6b-F0OWG54hvzzxnFfPnkSaAesMyxSBVD9-38V38oo46USd_quO02k3BCZuiCoq1vtlo3HfiZI1xZ06O1IabreJRY_bU_BT32pYaSmy264kgzmi8LvqH4nnGt6bFZysK0EHDavIueYX1d_iqt8lkWCNloyT3JrRHCIu2b1XV5h2gaC_kDPtraYganwUZiW9OdC8kIbmkzZa2jtqaCXNOJF8jmXxduCW23RBmt11QVOeeiGDccHsqeE8F2eywMthDhlfqmOWaONYF1UYOPyxkUz98-GP0txdJIqodRWH1aL6cLaMym4qRBRF7cdfz1Nk-dc73KqPXXulH8YjgfB2lRgA%3D)
---
[**_And that's exactly why the Left is focusing its fire on the judiciary in 2023._**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c04393b4044c4677b47c54fbd9e5e8ee&_e=pXEyLQTPNBEJQY7fmZIPdFBRTyWcvk2DvFVfDchP08QV4XBvcaKfhrTApeNIklpFtLfGuEXfcDrGlRWUcS5C6b-F0OWG54hvzzxnFfPnkSaAesMyxSBVD9-38V38oo46USd_quO02k3BCZuiCoq1vtlo3HfiZI1xZ06O1IabreJRY_bU_BT32pYaSmy264kgzmi8LvqH4nnGt6bFZysK0EHDavIueYX1d_iqt8lkWCNloyT3JrRHCIu2b1XV5h2gaC_kDPtraYganwUZiW9OdJox0wWeWNpbnqyKJ4FU7ouUsI3QSZNpVvgSR4PHmMB5q4xr6K8XvX87jJ95kV_z5Zi3OTjgBg_5QjwlHuDqUVxozSssIbTqv038fRlC3q9qsLDyIuHAsxlHIERuAB5cw13SO1WMxfsxTGCWtW3HtnI%3D) They know that the judicial branch has the power to put a stop to the Biden Administration's craziest liberal policies. It drives them INSANE to be kept within the bounds of the Constitution now that we’ve started fighting back against their judicial activism.
---
[**STAND WITH US**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c04393b4044c4677b47c54fbd9e5e8ee&_e=pXEyLQTPNBEJQY7fmZIPdFBRTyWcvk2DvFVfDchP08QV4XBvcaKfhrTApeNIklpFtLfGuEXfcDrGlRWUcS5C6b-F0OWG54hvzzxnFfPnkSaAesMyxSBVD9-38V38oo46USd_quO02k3BCZuiCoq1vtlo3HfiZI1xZ06O1IabreJRY_bU_BT32pYaSmy264kgzmi8LvqH4nnGt6bFZysK0EHDavIueYX1d_iqt8lkWCNloyT3JrRHCIu2b1XV5h2gaC_kDPtraYganwUZiW9OdMtgglgcB3WVmeGWGmOUnIoEKFWr6dRmgnG0flJE4GOqwh6-q7WuzKaH4xk789TWHv3faRqMYROJt3yanhyCCY_PDM0PhgbFNaN8SUyB8AOhR3BM4LPpfJuhqExE14CXhPqXZghw7uv7FW75e5AlO4E%3D)

As a well-informed conservative, you’ve heard of judicial activism before — but too many people think of it as something that happens only at the level of the Supreme Court. Peter, that’s simply not true. It happens at EVERY level of the judiciary. And that’s why**Fair Courts America** exists. **Our mission is to fight back against the woke mob’s takeover of our judicial system, from the Supreme Court to your local prosecutor.** [_**Peter, we need your help. Any amount you can give will support our efforts to defend the rule of law in our country. The woke mob is advancing on our courts right now, and only one thing can stop them from total takeover: YOU.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c04393b4044c4677b47c54fbd9e5e8ee&_e=pXEyLQTPNBEJQY7fmZIPdFBRTyWcvk2DvFVfDchP08QV4XBvcaKfhrTApeNIklpFtLfGuEXfcDrGlRWUcS5C6b-F0OWG54hvzzxnFfPnkSaAesMyxSBVD9-38V38oo46USd_quO02k3BCZuiCoq1vtlo3HfiZI1xZ06O1IabreJRY_bU_BT32pYaSmy264kgzmi8LvqH4nnGt6bFZysK0EHDavIueYX1d_iqt8lkWCNloyT3JrRHCIu2b1XV5h2gaC_kDPtraYganwUZiW9OdD6F_6OacLVSvILXWSoX8nNEyiWI2m-shmQzSfbUrZv9s8CRSQBTzECQZcfCrEnFyPdD_ngmGIHmHAx-CBhlFq5OL8kU-ZdZ_UNMwmCsz4aE-jFrd21VxrDII-VibJ2BN9dVyDlmKP7VFz-CwndqyTY%3D) In justice,Fair Courts America

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible
body:
| |
---
| | My fellow concerned American, Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child's leg to cure appendicitis. _Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_ ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her "bravery" and for giving your child the body he or she was "always meant to have." I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it 's not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl - Chloe Cole - after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive. **I need your help to fund this legal battle.** [**Will you donate an urgent $35 or more tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e543d0ec55a8458a8345a782c9f291a2&_e=zggx39_NQUbaAV7P0JJZGpVgcbDuX6IFhHcPS0EmDhJoEqWbsEUBqyOtw4Mv5TfDsBzMWA479bGzm6nWibt3CdV07bGdySFvbr-HvE95r-4xSHXVcOcKdpt22lACip7XZuUtnxq1l6kC7y3CVs9NrLjTOPRps_9Co7CHgcpsVZjw16GY0K9Xf96qOqQZwYIVG3hbfUjZOLNtk09YSca3ZdQkcu4YGhgMt1QPo0XILU4DMGoHBBjPJr7VMGJyCTQ7-eEBj7LnTutRSwk0Acv5FK3HUVDBi0GKuV0VEudDDrYbFd8dPTCDnGgUSB8mou3wlXWeKqZI5H-24shNYWoQ-J-m84uyk_KpvhnU-DbSfxPpXBX4UEKCleBhUzG_-Knd) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case. When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to "transition" her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical "professionals" coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering "treatment." **Doctors told her parents they could either have a "dead daughter or a living son."** Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical "professionals" pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. **Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it's time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I'm helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we're suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman--and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won't be easily won - we're facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you 're in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e543d0ec55a8458a8345a782c9f291a2&_e=zggx39_NQUbaAV7P0JJZGpVgcbDuX6IFhHcPS0EmDhJoEqWbsEUBqyOtw4Mv5TfDsBzMWA479bGzm6nWibt3CdV07bGdySFvbr-HvE95r-4xSHXVcOcKdpt22lACip7XZuUtnxq1l6kC7y3CVs9NrLjTOPRps_9Co7CHgcpsVZjw16GY0K9Xf96qOqQZwYIVG3hbfUjZOLNtk09YSca3ZdQkcu4YGhgMt1QPo0XILU5E3DS_BJQ3BtlWgkJt3GXK5pFzLnifxC0pZNangG57gkuULRlbc4GQ9BjDYLxuxA1Sadt2qBdx3zKjVdqoj19dTMvjMcRy7o_fSXROLheiwW10H84yp_jGi-nYzpfVvGPnVkjpYQW5PE4OJOn-REo3) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical "professionals" have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight--likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere. Will you stand with her? Thank you for supporting our mission today.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e543d0ec55a8458a8345a782c9f291a2&_e=zggx39_NQUbaAV7P0JJZGpVgcbDuX6IFhHcPS0EmDhJoEqWbsEUBqyOtw4Mv5TfDsBzMWA479bGzm6nWibt3CdV07bGdySFvbr-HvE95r-4xSHXVcOcKdpt22lACip7XZuUtnxq1l6kC7y3CVs9NrLjTOPRps_9Co7CHgcpsVZjw16GY0K9Xf96qOqQZwYIVG3hbfUjZOLNtk09YSca3ZdQkcu4YGhgMt1QPo0XILU4CG2mr_kVkiSN8S6F0OjXJsB8h-i3xJCzy9liPNp4ixVF4r-Br6aRRIaIBGrgALRwJCoKef8M5CndXmu1lc-oSlDKPuL2nQZ-42O8obGc0h-DNMbo42Ef4A9ZdJAARDLh5sn0qtOHy6F2PE4ifQWBQ)

| | P.S. If we don't fight back now and hold these medical "professionals" accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can't allow that. [**So please, join the fight to help us get justice for Chloe and save the future of our children with a tax-deductible gift of $35 more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e543d0ec55a8458a8345a782c9f291a2&_e=zggx39_NQUbaAV7P0JJZGpVgcbDuX6IFhHcPS0EmDhJoEqWbsEUBqyOtw4Mv5TfDsBzMWA479bGzm6nWibt3CdV07bGdySFvbr-HvE95r-4xSHXVcOcKdpt22lACip7XZuUtnxq1l6kC7y3CVs9NrLjTOPRps_9Co7CHgcpsVZjw16GY0K9Xf96qOqQZwYIVG3hbfUjZOLNtk09YSca3ZdQkcu4YGhgMt1QPo0XILU6-mSMR4n4jpvTU99zyB_RdEVSZDmwbfZ_VWGZriaTDOLnvRPgHsl_0srDjd5P2-AT-frSOxcj_-V-v14QpI0sNtk35WN_y3Mv9w_QwutpJ9FwU7UMQXWmtpV6PBmhyiHGfZePO8FcHkHyrBRJkc2sa)
