clean_body: | | | | My fellow concerned American, Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child's leg to cure appendicitis. Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her "bravery" and for giving your child the body he or she was "always meant to have." I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. Except it 's not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria. The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl - Chloe Cole - after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive. I need your help to fund this legal battle. Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case. When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to "transition" her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical "professionals" coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering "treatment." Doctors told her parents they could either have a "dead daughter or a living son." Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself. We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical "professionals" pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave herLupon Depot to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her. And it's time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I'm helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we're suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman--and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won't be easily won - we're facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported $8 billion profit in 2021 alone. These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical "professionals" have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight--likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere. Will you stand with her? Thank you for supporting our mission today. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. If we don't fight back now and hold these medical "professionals" accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can't allow that. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. subject: What a productive week in Congress
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=70d041f169&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter**WOW, what a productive week in Congress.**

We’re **changing the way business is done** in Washington because we stood our ground.

Congress is broken and our stand will help dramatically fix it! Now, **Republicans are united** following the important debate on the Speaker and rules.

We officially approved many new structural changes that will be a MAJOR step toward governing in a CONSERVATIVE way for the American people.

[**Please help us keep the momentum going and take on the Swamp!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c06052ef56&e=fdefed58de)
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d8c960a6b1&e=fdefed58de)
Our success this past week is a win for everyone who believes in representative government! And you know what -- we're not wasting any time, already voting to DEFUND Biden's new 87,000 IRS agents that were intended to target middle-class Americans.

We’ll be **stronger, more united** and **more effective** than ever.

These new rules empower every individual member of Congress!

I'm so proud that we took a few extra days to make sure that we get this right.

So now we have to take this momentum and put it to work -- [**pitch in today so we can hold Washington accountable for the American people!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a28f7bd973&e=fdefed58de) I promise to never stop fighting for you.

For Freedom,
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=cfa2c30c9a&e=fdefed58de)
|

clean_body: | | | PeterWOW, what a productive week in Congress. We’re changing the way business is done in Washington because we stood our ground. Congress is broken and our stand will help dramatically fix it! Now, Republicans are united following the important debate on the Speaker and rules. We officially approved many new structural changes that will be a MAJOR step toward governing in a CONSERVATIVE way for the American people. Our success this past week is a win for everyone who believes in representative government! And you know what -- we're not wasting any time, already voting to DEFUND Biden's new 87,000 IRS agents that were intended to target middle-class Americans. We’ll be stronger, more united and more effective than ever. These new rules empower every individual member of Congress! I'm so proud that we took a few extra days to make sure that we get this right. So now we have to take this momentum and put it to work -- I promise to never stop fighting for you. For Freedom, | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs9qf2ddo1b6j08a4ilkr3nlrpt62bc3pcn82gt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cti69oj4clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z02f54n7pk30tnpna27ppufqo7see2urmtvhl0h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cti69oj4clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5lrf6rgae9ptfmlmhdtddi1t4afd195fgiaamkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6cti69oj4clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. **[If you could give $10 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57327044/387585425/-269365724?refcode=EM_FR_230141HassanSplit_FR_MH_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTVlYTE2YS0zNjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KDlfr4aJAXZ3OPudk_ZQTkqUgcy3si7HsOsa2vb7zk0=)** The backstory is this: GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through. Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. **[Will you please give $10 or as much as you can to my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester's to help us retire our debt? body:
This is exactly what we said would happen.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57327577/387586598/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230114Disenfranchised_N_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1NzZiMTIwLTM5OTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8tNSS6B2_nB6eEaTgrf76Q3YE0JVdMa6d6ke4t54abA=)
| Once again our democracy is being tainted, fellow activist: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57327578/387586599/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230114Disenfranchised_N_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_G1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1NzZiMTIwLTM5OTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8tNSS6B2_nB6eEaTgrf76Q3YE0JVdMa6d6ke4t54abA=) More than 16,000 Pennsylvanians who voted by mail last November were disenfranchised — and **more than two-thirds were Democratic voters.** Many don't even know their vote was not counted.

It turns out that when you change the rules less than a week before the election to throw out otherwise eligible votes for not having an unnecessary date on the envelope, it has consequences.

**[This is exactly the kind of nonsense we’re talking about when we say the PA GOP is obsessed with suppressing the Commonwealth’s voters. Will you make a donation of $10 today to help us fight back against voter suppression and provide the civic education needed to make sure voters are informed?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57327579/387586600/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230114Disenfranchised_N_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1NzZiMTIwLTM5OTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8tNSS6B2_nB6eEaTgrf76Q3YE0JVdMa6d6ke4t54abA=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57327580/387586601/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230114Disenfranchised_N_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1NzZiMTIwLTM5OTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8tNSS6B2_nB6eEaTgrf76Q3YE0JVdMa6d6ke4t54abA=) Remember: Until shortly before the election, both state and federal courts had ruled mail-in ballots without dates should be counted.

Republicans were pushing a baseless requirement of including the dates on the grounds of “security and secrecy,” which clearly violated The Civil Rights Act’s prohibition against disenfranchising voters for minor, immaterial errors.

Then, in October, the extremist U.S. Supreme Court ruled the federal court decision moot. Less than a week before the election, Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court followed it with a 3-3 ruling saying the ballots should not be counted — with no reasoning given. **[That is why it is up to us, fellow activist, a voting rights organization, to stand up against suppressing voters and to not only expand the electorate but also civically engage, educate and mobilize Pennsylvania’s youth, immigrants, Black, Indigenous, and other people of color. Will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can right now to help us keep up our work to defend our democracy against blatant voter suppression like this?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57327581/387586602/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230114Disenfranchised_N_TEAM_90DO_7_G_A_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1NzZiMTIwLTM5OTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8tNSS6B2_nB6eEaTgrf76Q3YE0JVdMa6d6ke4t54abA=)** clean_body: This is exactly what we said would happen. = | Once again our democracy is being tainted, fellow activist: = More than 16,000 Pennsylvanians who voted by mail last November were disenfranchised — and more than two-thirds were Democratic voters. Many don't even know their vote was not counted. It turns out that when you change the rules less than a week before the election to throw out otherwise eligible votes for not having an unnecessary date on the envelope, it has consequences. = = Remember: Until shortly before the election, both state and federal courts had ruled mail-in ballots without dates should be counted. Republicans were pushing a baseless requirement of including the dates on the grounds of “security and secrecy,” which clearly violated The Civil Rights Act’s prohibition against disenfranchising voters for minor, immaterial errors. Then, in October, the extremist U.S. Supreme Court ruled the federal court decision moot. Less than a week before the election, Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court followed it with a 3-3 ruling saying the ballots should not be counted — with no reasoning given. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: The Republican refuseniks were right – Mississippi’s favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132756?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**What a farce! Having won a narrow majority in the US House of Representatives back in November, last week the Republicans could not even agree on who should be Speaker.** For the first time in living memory, a Speaker was not elected on the first ballot as a handful of Republican Representatives refused to support Kevin McCarthy. Eventually, after 15 votes – and plenty of concessions to the Republican refuseniks – McCarthy scrapped together just enough votes to get the job. **Such shenanigans, some will scoff, are yet more evidence of America’s political dysfunction.** A Trumpian faction, others insist, are so intent on waging war against the political establishment that they are making America ungovernable.
---
|
---
_Dysfunction or democracy?_
| **Hang on a second. That narrative is nonsense.** What happened last week shows not dysfunction, but the first stirrings of a long overdue renewal within one of Washington’s most moribund institutions. Lazy journalists might find it easy to portray the Republican refuseniks as Trumpian, but Trump does not explain why they withheld their support from Kevin McCarthy.
The 45th President supported McCarthy for Speaker unequivocally, as did many of his more strident supporters in the House. Indeed, Marjorie Taylor Greene was reported to have him on the end of her cell phone, as she tried to encourage the last few holdouts to fall into line. What eventually brought the Republican rebels into line was neither Trump nor Greene, but a series of concessions that they wrung from McCarthy. **Sick and tired of watching Congress rubber stamp decisions, the hold outs sought a series of changes to the House procedures that would enable them, as the elected representatives of the people, to have a greater say.** Thanks to the concessions they won, in the 118th Congress, there will be a vote on a balanced budget amendment. Efforts to raise the nation’s debt ceiling must be paired with spending cuts. Appropriations bills will have to be moved individually. Having served in the British House of Commons for 12 years, a legislature in which individual members have not had the ability to amend budget bills in over a generation, I cannot tell you how vital I believe it is for an effective legislature to have the power of the purse. **If Congress were to give up the power to control federal spending, the socialization of America will become both inevitable and irreversible.**
---
|
---
_Ousting a Speaker_
| Anyone that believes in limited government should cheer the way in which the Republican holdouts secured a set of concessions that will mean Congress can now cap the ability of the administrative state to make discretionary spending decisions. The House will once again have the power to reduce the salary of government officials. **Alarmed at the way that the previous Speaker, Nancy Pelosi, re-wrote the House rule book to give her greater power, Republican refuseniks also insisted on restoring the power to members to trigger a motion of no confidence in the Speaker at any time.** The key word here is ‘restore’. The Republican party’s awkward squad in the House successfully sought to give back to members of the House powers that are rightfully theirs. Back in 2009 in Britain, I tabled a motion of confidence in the Speaker of the House of Commons. This led to the removal of the then Speaker for the first time in over 300 years. The biggest challenge I had in ousting a Speaker who was clearly not up to the job was not garnering support from within the legislature. It was figuring out a procedure to move the motion. It is vital that members of the US House of Representatives retain a clear process for removing a redundant Speaker. **Last, but not least, the rebels won a concession which means that they will have at least 72 hours to review bills before they come to the floor. Stop and ask yourself why this has not been happening in the first place?** Those elected to the House of Representatives are sent to Washington DC to make laws. How are they able to do that if they do not even have time to study and consider the bills they are expected to vote on? As for the idea that what happened in Washington last week was unprecedented, there have been 14 previous occasions when there were multiple votes to choose a Speaker. Back in the mid-19th century, the 34th Congress took 133 ballots before deciding. **The House might have had to take a couple of extra days to choose a Speaker, but it will be time well spent if it means that our elected lawmakers rediscover how to do their jobs.** Over the past half-century or so, the law in America has ceased to be a set of clearly defined statutes given effect by those that we elect. ‘The law’ has instead come to mean a set of rules generated by various branches of the administrative state to whom Congress has delegated too much decision-making. The power to allocate public money has been given to those that are not directly answerable to the public. **Last week saw a concerted effort to restore to the House of Representatives the role and responsibilities Congress should never have conceded. That is not evidence that American democracy is dysfunctional. It might just show us how American democracy can be renewed.** Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=793f051303&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")

Douglas Carswell

Friend, on January 18 I’m going to watch my son be sworn in as the next Governor of Maryland. 🖤🤍💛 It’s such an exciting day for our family, and Wes, Aruna and their team have worked so hard to get to this point. But the team tells me that January 18 is also the day when Wes and Aruna have to pause their fundraising until the end of their first legislative session in April. **Wes has been so busy preparing to take office that he hasn’t had time to dial for dollars.** I’m proud that he’s prioritizing meeting with constituents and the government offices he’ll be overseeing, but it does mean he’s behind on hitting his goal before the freeze starts. **[Wes only has 3 days left to meet his goal before the fundraising freeze, so I’m hoping you can help us before that deadline. body:
| |

| | | Friend,

A petition circulating in leftist circles to impeach Justice Thomas is closing in on 1.3 MILLION signatures. Friend, Justice Thomas has REPEATEDLY endured unfounded attacks by the radical left solely for his commitment to upholding the Constitution. As an instrument of the law, he has admirably sought to adhere to the founding fathers' original designs for America - the left HATES him for that.

I wanted to share with you how thankful I am to serve as the Speaker of the House and to lead our NEW Republican Majority in Congress.

These clauses were always problematic. They intentionally restricted competition and directly harmed workers’ rights. Worse, they began to appear in work contracts for low-wage jobs. According to the Minneapolis Fed, this worked **[Read More...](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWUwMSZzZXlpZD00MzE3MSJ9/0jnjQTjLkmhFpirrFYbK5g)** | |

name: Shontel Brown
subject: We knew they would come for this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
He just gave away your Medicare
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57329239/387591647/-849735382?refcode=M_PET_230114Medicare_N_SB_90DO_7_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYThjYzEwNC00Mjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6updfQaWIIXID_cCo3maMFD8gLugHFk9Z2SH7F5SUR4=) Peter, one week into the new Congress and the GOP is already coming for your Social Security and Medicare.

_We may have had some fun watching the Republicans fail to elect a speaker for 14 rounds of voting,_ but the concessions McCarthy has made to appease the Freedom Caucus and secure his speakership are no laughing matter. **One concession he made was to cap spending at 2022 levels, meaning $130 billion in cuts to vital programs like Social Security and Medicare.**

We’ve long known the GOP has been itching to slash your Social Security and Medicare. **Now that they control the House, they’re proving us right by proposing radical spending cuts that would send millions of Americans into the depths of poverty.** McCarthy will do whatever the Freedom Caucus says to keep his gavel, even if it means harming everyday Americans like yourself.

[**_With so many Americans relying on Social Security and Medicare, we’re not going to let them take it away from us so easily. Will you sign my petition today and tell McCarthy and his radical GOP members to keep their hands off your Social Security?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57329240/387591648/-1237483619?refcode=M_PET_230114Medicare_N_SB_90DO_7_NG_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYThjYzEwNC00Mjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6updfQaWIIXID_cCo3maMFD8gLugHFk9Z2SH7F5SUR4=&emci=f78cc104-4294-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=fa8cc104-4294-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57329241/387591649/-1237483619?refcode=M_PET_230114Medicare_N_SB_90DO_7_NG_TESTB_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYThjYzEwNC00Mjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6updfQaWIIXID_cCo3maMFD8gLugHFk9Z2SH7F5SUR4=&emci=f78cc104-4294-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=fa8cc104-4294-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=23746811) After failing to elect a speaker on the first ballot for the first time in a century, McCarthy and the Freedom Caucus went into their smoke-filled Congressional rooms and negotiated a deal that would give McCarthy the votes to become speaker.

Unfortunately, the American people got the short end of that deal. Drastic cuts to spending could cause millions of Americans to lose their Social Security and Medicare benefits. But Democrats in the House and President Biden are here to defend those benefits.

[**_Rather than cutting programs to save costs, Congress needs to commit to finding ways to work more effectively for those in need and for those who will need Social Security and Medicare for years to come. Will you join me and sign my petition today telling McCarthy to leave your Social Security and Medicare alone?_ **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57329242/387591650/-1237483619?refcode=M_PET_230114Medicare_N_SB_90DO_7_NG_TESTB_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYThjYzEwNC00Mjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6updfQaWIIXID_cCo3maMFD8gLugHFk9Z2SH7F5SUR4=&emci=f78cc104-4294-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=fa8cc104-4294-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=23746811)

We may have had some fun watching the Republicans fail to elect a speaker for 14 rounds of voting, but the concessions McCarthy has made to appease the Freedom Caucus and secure his speakership are no laughing matter. One concession he made was to cap spending at 2022 levels, meaning $130 billion in cuts to vital programs like Social Security and Medicare. We’ve long known the GOP has been itching to slash your Social Security and Medicare. Now that they control the House, they’re proving us right by proposing radical spending cuts that would send millions of Americans into the depths of poverty. McCarthy will do whatever the Freedom Caucus says to keep his gavel, even if it means harming everyday Americans like yourself. After failing to elect a speaker on the first ballot for the first time in a century, McCarthy and the Freedom Caucus went into their smoke-filled Congressional rooms and negotiated a deal that would give McCarthy the votes to become speaker. Unfortunately, the American people got the short end of that deal. Drastic cuts to spending could cause millions of Americans to lose their Social Security and Medicare benefits. But Democrats in the House and President Biden are here to defend those benefits. Always on your side, Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kari Lake must not be a U.S. Senator. She isn’t morally fit for a position in government, proven again after the tantrum she threw following her gubernatorial loss to Katie Hobbs in Arizona … but Kyrsten Sinema may yet give Lake a way in.
body:
Don’t let Kari Lake near the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2781653-a669-4e9d-9785-0f163398b7d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Kari Lake can’t be allowed to be a U.S. Senator. She isn’t morally fit for a position in government, proven again after the tantrum she threw over her gubernatorial loss to Katie Hobbs in Arizona. Election officials have had to go into hiding because of Lake's lies about election fraud--they've received enough credible death threats that they have police protection. _ [**_Can you join us right now in giving Congressman Ruben Gallego--who's been one of the Democrats' strongest voices in the House and would make an amazing Senator!!--$5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a9340e3-183b-458d-b067-5d789eff13d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yet, the result of Kyrsten Sinema's ego driven betrayal of Democrats who worked, donated and voted for her may lead to this tragedy. Democratic firm Blueprint Polling released numbers showing a three-way race with Sinema as a spoiler._ **_Lake leads Democrat, Ruben Gallego, 35.7-31.9%, with Sinema at 13.8%. Sinema can't win, but she can hand the election to a fascist trying to overthrow AZ democracy._** **_We CAN'T let this happen._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7f89859a-1d0f-4a5f-b82f-efe25ae753f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Gallego's a young, progressive Latino veteran. He's personable, passionate about helping working people & protecting those GOP policies assault every day. Gallego's so close to matching Lake--within 3.8 points! And nearly 19% of voters are undecided, many of whom Gallego can win._** [**_Can you join us right now in giving Congressman Ruben Gallego--who's been one of the Democrats' strongest voices in the House and would make an amazing Senator!!--$5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfeff5867-4f92-4c94-ac61-1710d6e97cff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for supporting a true champion of the people in Gallego. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Mark Kelly
subject: my friend Kirsten needs our help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — my friend Kirsten Gillibrand just launched her Senate re-election campaign, and we need to make sure she has the resources she needs to fight back against the National Republicans going after her seat and defend the Senate’s razor-thin majority.
[**Please, can you rush $5 or more — every dollar will be split between Kirsten’s and my campaigns — to keep her seat and hold the Senate?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-gillibrand23.Iv_NSe&refcode=em230114-1-15&t=1&akid=4892%2E6688874%2EEXwPue)
Please allow me just a moment to explain why this race is so important:
Our Democratic Senate majority is hanging on by a thread. If we lose just two seats, Mitch McConnell regains control — putting everything from reproductive freedom to the fundamental right to vote to the future of the Supreme Court in serious danger.
Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ reports that the GOP has a clear path to retaking the Senate in 2024, and that’s exactly what will happen if we take a seat like Kirsten’s for granted.
So today, I’m personally asking you to step up and make sure Kirsten has the resources she needs to fight back and win.
[**Can you split a $5 donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and me today? Your grassroots support will be critical to defeating the National Republicans and holding the Senate.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-gillibrand23.Iv_NSe&refcode=em230114-1-15&t=2&akid=4892%2E6688874%2EEXwPue)

name: JohnFetterman.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Time is running short for us
#
Derek,
We'll get straight to the point:
We're setting a 48-hour fundraising goal to raise $21,433 by 11:59 PM on Sunday, so we're able to keep supporting John's important work in the Senate. We had a slow start to the year, and time is running short for us to get our January fundraising numbers back on track.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230114-1?refcode=em20230114-1-8211&refcode2=8211_434096_FnQ7WW&akid=8211%2E434096%2EFnQ7WW)
With John as the 51st Democratic vote in the Senate, we can't afford to be complacent. Grassroots donations are the only way we'll be able to reach our goal -- **[so if you're able to now, will you make a contribution before time is up on our mid-month fundraising goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230114-1?refcode=em20230114-1-8211&refcode2=8211_434096_FnQ7WW&akid=8211%2E434096%2EFnQ7WW)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230114-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230114-8211&refcode2=8211_434096_FnQ7WW&akid=8211%2E434096%2EFnQ7WW)**
The last few weeks have shown that we really need John fighting for PA in the Senate. Reaching this $21,433 goal will make sure that John can focus on his work in DC and not worry about our fundraising numbers.
Every time we've asked, this team has stepped up. **[It'd mean a lot to John if you could chip in $5 or whatever makes sense for you right now to power our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230114-1?refcode=em20230114-1-8211&refcode2=8211_434096_FnQ7WW&akid=8211%2E434096%2EFnQ7WW)**
We know we can crush this goal — and even if you can't chip in right now, thank you for reading these emails + being on this team. 😎
Together,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230114-8211-footer&t=4&refcode2=8211_434096_FnQ7WW&akid=8211%2E434096%2EFnQ7WW)**

name: Julia, Finance Director (via Justice Democrats)
subject: I don’t usually work on the weekends…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter,

It’s Julia, JD’s finance director. This morning, I poured a cup of coffee
and sat down with our fundraising numbers for the month.

I don’t usually work on the weekends, but this is really important. We had
a slow start to the month and now we need to raise $8,000 from emails just
like this one in order to stay on track to pay all of our bills this
month.

The good news is that if 1 out of 3 folks who open this email each donate
$3, then we can hit this goal before tomorrow at midnight.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124874?refcode=em20230114-27046&t=1001&akid=27046%2E1203867%2E03O_e3 ]Will you contribute $3 right now? By being one of those
people, you can really make a difference and help us continue to recruit
and elect progressive fighters and fight against the establishment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124874?refcode=em20230114-27046&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27046%2E1203867%2E03O_e3 ]Contribute $3

Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, or
Cori Bush in Congress. Justice Democrats recruited each of these leaders
to run and win and we’re building the infrastructure for even more
grassroots candidates to do the same.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124874?refcode=em20230114-27046&t=1021&akid=27046%2E1203867%2E03O_e3 ]We can’t continue to fall short of our fundraising goals. The success
of Justice Democrats as an organization is largely dependent on our
fundraising numbers and whether we’re able to reach this $8,000 goal. Will
you contribute right now?

We don’t take this work lightly — we know what we’re up against, and we do
everything in our power to set our candidates up for success. There’s no
other organization that does what we do. But our work is only possible
because of your grassroots support.

More soon,

Julia Eddy
Finance Director, Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=27046%2E1203867%2E03O_e3 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=27046%2E1203867%2E03O_e3 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230114-27046-footer&t=1024&refcode2=27046_1203867_03O_e3&akid=27046%2E1203867%2E03O_e3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=27046%2E1203867%2E03O_e3

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e751bac5d6a4210b27b1fdff2de5108&_e=tgYGnF0zX5gSPmU8nXSRS_MuPrs1ROLo4oHehnqi5X1G8JqC1dXh7WmZRN-89bpzXMuoLI9N7zL4pchVtrsj-mIgcq3iM22wGWzj4bipbuhyXs1JTS_2myt7TspUMZA9vegizPvNtUnTGf3juevJEFyq8nPRREkKUGLeL_qTHQDLyy41xTGaxC6rj9cVI5raSYjb0XxnFc2Atmr64qmCTNH8m89OaLnAmxtKZNOkvWxWFfvMMAnNNgkqOf4PBFYroopo2tu1xkk23EEpPy7xts50RkUhYpO--WioM1Ltpqkqk-ic1Fgt7KFADsHQGlw9tMDnYfrNoABkLIDYcv-kiFxxFTByyLVYNnPM6DT4Z6R_w2pe0ZWXy2kuPHsaG_slSjURHZwK6IsLFl6sadkPh8KolQIKUn9bmQp2BkZ0Y_mHDv010l1GoLAsmqm9GASa)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e751bac5d6a4210b27b1fdff2de5108&_e=tgYGnF0zX5gSPmU8nXSRS_MuPrs1ROLo4oHehnqi5X1G8JqC1dXh7WmZRN-89bpzXMuoLI9N7zL4pchVtrsj-mIgcq3iM22wGWzj4bipbuhyXs1JTS_2myt7TspUMZA9vegizPvNtUnTGf3juevJEFyq8nPRREkKUGLeL_qTHQDLyy41xTGaxC6rj9cVI5raSYjb0XxnFc2Atmr64qmCTNH8m89OaLnAmxtKZNOkvWxWFfvMMAnNNgkqOf4PBFYroopo2tu1xkk23EEpPy7xtjlhsOVBDytFg6ODQq0OUGvoMbmULvtO44hrjYCbR95yjyQCbC_Qndev50LnuyfwgCM2WlpafPanALn7zp1ZAG1euwW0Mv6flOdrjSrB-m3UPfVrM83WyvXHh0ZkP_bMrysDTzdmekRTcEjAp2u9ObSod_64AwXa81FdYL30qcFl)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e751bac5d6a4210b27b1fdff2de5108&_e=tgYGnF0zX5gSPmU8nXSRS_MuPrs1ROLo4oHehnqi5X1G8JqC1dXh7WmZRN-89bpzXMuoLI9N7zL4pchVtrsj-mIgcq3iM22wGWzj4bipbuhyXs1JTS_2myt7TspUMZA9vegizPvNtUnTGf3juevJEFyq8nPRREkKUGLeL_qTHQDLyy41xTGaxC6rj9cVI5raSYjb0XxnFc2Atmr64qmCTNH8m89OaLnAmxtKZNOkvWxWFfvMMAnNNgkqOf4PBFYroopo2tu1xkk23EEpPy7xtgc4sB5s5N_dUYYbGWvJYqwH-N7UjY9GYGZRzyWLhH1Rp6dcpX6AniR7s4A3ByH2eAHG4pWxDUQnu_3K9OYF0Nq7rgmZSwD15DVtgautBHMLq1pU6w_G156vcXWlYhWBOKbTOAtUetXxGO1JA5x-yYcad6M1BaC_ryvlqGj3LVRD)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e751bac5d6a4210b27b1fdff2de5108&_e=tgYGnF0zX5gSPmU8nXSRS_MuPrs1ROLo4oHehnqi5X1G8JqC1dXh7WmZRN-89bpzXMuoLI9N7zL4pchVtrsj-mIgcq3iM22wGWzj4bipbuhyXs1JTS_2myt7TspUMZA9vegizPvNtUnTGf3juevJEFyq8nPRREkKUGLeL_qTHQDLyy41xTGaxC6rj9cVI5raSYjb0XxnFc2Atmr64qmCTNH8m89OaLnAmxtKZNOkvWxWFfvMMAnNNgkqOf4PBFYroopo2tu1xkk23EEpPy7xtlDdrTKysmUBpuoGVCjy3iTE_CxdruM2BaW1WcJo5kcaDdRUYO5uKd46eKFNiLsbt32HfWNI43gKUeKNQv_ppvWV-jvquqInioDPp1W1ArZgxD7vJvlLPwuUwN_CmRdpIhxyqL8p6Kqk_YOLIBLgzxOLcZIgr5x-tUfK9hK4PNyU).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Just look at this list of things that WILL NOT pass unless the Senate ends the Filibuster:

● And SO MUCH MORE.
So we’re sending a message to the Senate to pressure them to choose DEMOCRACY over the FILIBUSTER.
That’s why we’re rushing to get 10,000 signatures on our petition to pressure the Senate to ABOLISH the Filibuster and save our Democracy. But we need 200 Democrats by 11:59 PM to stay on track. Sign now: [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/reich-abolish-filibuster-100922-1-2]

name: Jason Crow
subject: Here's why Team Crow needs you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself, friend.

I'm Jason Crow, and I represent Colorado's 6th district in Congress. I am working hard to address the climate crisis, find solutions to the gun violence epidemic, and ensure that our government works for the people, not corporations and special interests.

As a former Army Ranger who served in Iraq and Afghanistan, values like equality, duty, and justice hold a deep meaning to me.

I have seen firsthand the importance of the rule-of-law and how fragile democracy can be if we do not look after it. So when I was called upon to serve as an impeachment manager in Donald Trump's first Senate impeachment trial, I stepped up to perform that duty for the sake of our democracy. There is no doubt in my mind that his enablers' failure to hold him accountable led to one of the darkest days in our nation's history: January 6.

The task before us now is to recognize that our democracy is only as strong as our willingness to uphold it. We have to advance our values, strengthen our democratic systems, and prevent corrupt leaders like Trump and his enablers from holding political office.

It has always been my #1 priority in Congress to serve the people — and no one else. Will you make the commitment to protect this democracy alongside me? Add your name to join me now » [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2022-welcome-sr1]

It's an honor to serve you,

Jason Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-2022-welcome]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/p/_ip9EBc0-UqWUsBDgB-c0g2?unsubscribedata=Mk%2BsnOsXa32CoDJBMakGLK876L%2BM62S8bWTA6xp393GQB1SL9faGm%2BA%2FfcFv4eWgiTtfoQX4e8SYk6ffKdgvXX7F%2FAD8X5rSKQg%2Fi%2Blo5QPku6wpsxa%2BTyb6ItCNlkTCcRJFSrob0PyWwpjPtm4JuDB5yBpCYueaxOZlIoE8G%2BLpa7j5EILtlxuA9Jblfqch98xR5P0WLGoKhVs2TQ9CV14duSgxRhScHBW0Y3rE0PvZn1cuKPij5WNeWIz3fdCcREqNZ2Tr04kn07H7EnsQydT5CPg%2BvDbjc%2BsLN65T%2B8ex%2B7tcg9mdJLL5HrjWArQIzawkunoEXL2jzQtoIErDGKbhKuYCiFCm90kOAAjDyDQalt506FaceOVCVJJKone%2FRuOV%2BZQmEUrxs%2F3LDvRx9%2BrTS6VZc0KZLSyAOrlxnhkE%2FpQbeR0oEIfkiHxcDUEd] If this is not your preferred email address, you can update your information here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5AdTmae3UU6fPeitwGd55w2] We believe that emails are an important way for Jason Crow for Congress to stay in contact with supporters like you. We appreciate any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. You can contact us here [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com?subject=Feedback] with any questions, concerns, or ideas. To receive text updates from Team Crow, join us here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/bjvZx6_NWU2fx5btnSgikw2] .

subject: What issues are top-of-mind?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Please take our 2023 Local Issues Survey to share what issues are most important to you right now — our team values your input. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57319726/387555577/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230114_e_survey_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODgyMzJkNi0xZDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BXsK4PyO84NiWVFwcf9oCECNGUSZ5swWjXFUiKjY-g=&emci=7f9ae63e-7893-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b88232d6-1d94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

| | Hey there, After a long election cycle, we’re excited to welcome new lawmakers into office, make progress on the issues that matter most to you, and continue our work to ensure free and fair elections in Georgia and beyond — so our leaders’ actions reflect the will of the people. Many of the policy questions that most impact us and our families are determined at the local level. We as voters get a say in deciding how our communities are led. And we want to know your top priorities as we begin the new year. [_**Please take our 2023 Local Issues Survey to share what issues are most important to you right now and our team will use your input to inform our future work.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57319728/387555579/-1331656584?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230114_e_survey_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODgyMzJkNi0xZDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BXsK4PyO84NiWVFwcf9oCECNGUSZ5swWjXFUiKjY-g=&emci=7f9ae63e-7893-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b88232d6-1d94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1037277) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57319730/387555581/-1331656584?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230114_e_survey_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODgyMzJkNi0xZDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BXsK4PyO84NiWVFwcf9oCECNGUSZ5swWjXFUiKjY-g=&emci=7f9ae63e-7893-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b88232d6-1d94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)
---
Our work to protect the freedom to vote goes far beyond the ballot. No matter what issues motivate you the most, they all connect to the work we do here at Fair Fight — because we can only see change if we get to elect the officials we want.
But so much of that work begins with hearing from you and your community. This will only take a minute: [_**What issues are top-of-mind for you, your family, and your community?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57319733/387555583/-1331656584?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230114_e_survey_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODgyMzJkNi0xZDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BXsK4PyO84NiWVFwcf9oCECNGUSZ5swWjXFUiKjY-g=&emci=7f9ae63e-7893-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b88232d6-1d94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

clean_body: Please take our 2023 Local Issues Survey to share what issues are most important to you right now — our team values your input. | | | Hey there, After a long election cycle, we’re excited to welcome new lawmakers into office, make progress on the issues that matter most to you, and continue our work to ensure free and fair elections in Georgia and beyond — so our leaders’ actions reflect the will of the people. Many of the policy questions that most impact us and our families are determined at the local level. We as voters get a say in deciding how our communities are led. And we want to know your top priorities as we begin the new year. | Our work to protect the freedom to vote goes far beyond the ballot. No matter what issues motivate you the most, they all connect to the work we do here at Fair Fight — because we can only see change if we get to elect the officials we want. But so much of that work begins with hearing from you and your community. body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Endorsement Alert Christian Leader David Barrett
---
| Dear Friend, I am honored to have received the endorsement of my good friend and fellow Christian Leader, David Barrett ([Learn about David Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014wRry7e23l0Vvfr25a0qY6b-MvEpZk7VrYUbmEw9d2V7yBQua0hBZwRLmkPa-xvklLabkt2TX2wXnwwwguhIICR2T44Ti3pXnY4xI8eWgumqd8cPh0YO57OjMi6nOK-yuKIpYEGcmLYrGUmCJNRO5w==&c=gl3CRIEqgrSy7aGANgdzo8Cq5CWIAMkKT6PBU_ZT44YgJuflzCQtjg==&ch=l10PsQ3NQk7ya0H_a88Zy29XbptUvzVSYPkdnMgKKovxBgWmM_uAfg==)), for my Virginia State Senate District 10 campaign!
---
| | |
---|---
|
"I have been very involved in Virginia State government for more than two decades. Every once in awhile, we see a Christian conservative come along who has a true Biblical worldview AND the courage to always vote the right way, NO MATTER WHAT! John McGuire is one of those people who we need in our Commonwealth's State Senate right now. John stands strong for God, our beloved USA, and the families of Virginia. I am proud to endorse Delegate John McGuire for Virginia State Senate 10. His Campaign Kickoff Event was wonderful. It makes me even more all in for his campaign."

-David Barrett, President of Barrett Capitol Management

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Biden’s economy
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=4e76f038ef304e47bd05c9b3824115e3&_e=LUd_A0SEIY4LxQj3hrqtTRNEkHw_Yhc1xkw1x_JemlzyYeQhCFnuoxd-udHZwTw5ZvIzcpGtBX2UMYapAQiUUN7GR_W1JfgWp8YEFb2ZRjdTV-df3Mx361X76Ha-kGOzUP05-ghDweVUrJ88hZJnnrSKL4pUrks-WW5mYCObhJdDqUS-mBYthEPm0q966jHJtZAjUM2OIznByMYS1ik8y2copOROsAYOVvMjRnuDo4MXuRBPg9Nh4UruzICejRTwbZqr46rHjWjxWJMjol4Z8kBvkOqP7MIyGNRoHWbUDv4r5H1FbyjyZKpexVzaQz__PRDolwwb1DewURXX21aE98yDqqtZg64358v6eEO2zvM%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Bidenflation is crushing families. It costs more at the pump, and that’s how we get to work. It costs more at the grocery store, and that’s how we feed our families. When Michael and I were raising our kids, do you know where we would have gotten that from? A credit card. **_That’s what’s happening to middle-class America._** This is a crisis. [**But the Republican Party knows the solutions that will get us back to better days. That’s why supporting Republicans who will offer solutions is key.**](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=4e76f038ef304e47bd05c9b3824115e3&_e=LUd_A0SEIY4LxQj3hrqtTRNEkHw_Yhc1xkw1x_JemlzyYeQhCFnuoxd-udHZwTw5ZvIzcpGtBX2UMYapAQiUUN7GR_W1JfgWp8YEFb2ZRjdTV-df3Mx361X76Ha-kGOzUP05-ghDweVUrJ88hZJnnrSKL4pUrks-WW5mYCObhJdDqUS-mBYthEPm0q966jHJtZAjUM2OIznByMYS1ik8y9Eiag3rnhFSL1Qqa2ky-WoiwEBqBf6AqZ6roIqKqpltjMoWOH2N2JcSWQJYDzDStr9wnWSB8eJNmrjuinfrjFUmqQ02IGUIsDKOfGd53c0So3W7m7VinUCd4X0cOVgEzOzZfMQWGgrPLA2QK3nY0e8%3D) I’ve spent the last two years traveling the country and supporting innovative leaders who are fighting for conservative solutions. We need to cut wasteful spending. We need to cut taxes. We need to pump more oil and gas than ever before. And we don’t need Washington to pay people to sit on the couch! We put those same solutions to work in South Carolina... When I came into office, our unemployment rate was 10.8%. In prior years, all our eggs had been put in the textile basket. When textile manufacturing went overseas, so did all of our jobs. So when I came in I knew we had to recruit. And I didn’t want to recruit from other states—that was too easy. I wanted to recruit from overseas, **_because I wanted to make things in America again. _** We retrained our workforce and taught them skills. Our citizens started believing in South Carolina again, and more importantly, they started believing in themselves again. And it worked. Unemployment hit a 15-year low... We were known as the “Beast of the Southeast,” which I loved. And I know... if we did it in South Carolina—we can do it for all of America! **[Stand For America PAC has been at the forefront of supporting conservative candidates who will fight for solutions. If you’re with me and want to support conservatives who promote solutions and stand for America, I’m asking you to pitch in a donation to Stand For America PAC today.](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=4e76f038ef304e47bd05c9b3824115e3&_e=LUd_A0SEIY4LxQj3hrqtTRNEkHw_Yhc1xkw1x_JemlzyYeQhCFnuoxd-udHZwTw5ZvIzcpGtBX2UMYapAQiUUN7GR_W1JfgWp8YEFb2ZRjdTV-df3Mx361X76Ha-kGOzUP05-ghDweVUrJ88hZJnnrSKL4pUrks-WW5mYCObhJdDqUS-mBYthEPm0q966jHJtZAjUM2OIznByMYS1ik8y20LimVv5lClVeTgz8Ysbli56I8xJF1DAYRaY81zw_Zu9-I7NUCYLEmLG8D5ePX7K8QsBNrqD8Tw1_MTAL5k_aZYWR0dykmMqEz5aznBE4z6nP9CnO04i1ui-MMinv8WAEbsgRwRfxMsQyXpNAhMnlk%3D) ** My very best,
---
[](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=4e76f038ef304e47bd05c9b3824115e3&_e=LUd_A0SEIY4LxQj3hrqtTRNEkHw_Yhc1xkw1x_JemlzyYeQhCFnuoxd-udHZwTw5ZvIzcpGtBX2UMYapAQiUUN7GR_W1JfgWp8YEFb2ZRjdTV-df3Mx361X76Ha-kGOzUP05-ghDweVUrJ88hZJnnrSKL4pUrks-WW5mYCObhJdDqUS-mBYthEPm0q966jHJtZAjUM2OIznByMYS1ik8ywz50dMo0pyEHjuNtv3KXxtEkKDji5LYMPp_rq3GYwdphmtH7oC3r3MMcdRjgV8ybiB1A_pcnqWAcXGxV60AUooOWDgKYaMOLggfwaDchMT8J77GkikJMaIIzE95xgBGYL1cSrDmt5ZqPc8y9gvoBro%3D)

Nikki Haley

Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. It’s called “If You Want Something Done...” and it profiles bold, courageous women and the lessons they teach us about making a difference, overcoming adversity, and sticking to principle. clean_body: | | | Friend, Bidenflation is crushing families. It costs more at the pump, and that’s how we get to work. It costs more at the grocery store, and that’s how we feed our families. When Michael and I were raising our kids, do you know where we would have gotten that from? A credit card. That’s what’s happening to middle-class America. This is a crisis. I’ve spent the last two years traveling the country and supporting innovative leaders who are fighting for conservative solutions. We need to cut wasteful spending. We need to cut taxes. We need to pump more oil and gas than ever before. And we don’t need Washington to pay people to sit on the couch! We put those same solutions to work in South Carolina... When I came into office, our unemployment rate was 10.8%. In prior years, all our eggs had been put in the textile basket. When textile manufacturing went overseas, so did all of our jobs. So when I came in I knew we had to recruit. And I didn’t want to recruit from other states—that was too easy. I wanted to recruit from overseas, because I wanted to make things in America again. We retrained our workforce and taught them skills. Our citizens started believing in South Carolina again, and more importantly, they started believing in themselves again. And it worked. Unemployment hit a 15-year low... We were known as the “Beast of the Southeast,” which I loved. And I know... if we did it in South Carolina—we can do it for all of America! My very best, Nikki Haley | | | Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. It’s called “If You Want Something Done...” and it profiles bold, courageous women and the lessons they teach us about making a difference, overcoming adversity, and sticking to principle. | | Copyright © 2023 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: It’s projection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, have you heard of a man named George Santos, the new
House Republican elected to represent Long Island, exposed by the New York
Times for fabricating practically his entire life story?

You know, this guy:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Bvk6kQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]George Santos @Santos4Congress on Twitter: 'How many lies does Adam Schiff
need to tell in order to be held accountable?'

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em.lYGpWb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]Yup. He actually said that. These people are totally shameless. But
before we catalog only some of the many lies George Santos has told to
pave his way to Congress, will you chip in $10 to help our team respond to
GOP grifters like George Santos?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jan2023_abs_em.6K9j-B&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2023_abs_em.0DnwtB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Cm-_r3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1008&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2023_abs_em.cg_Pq_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1009&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jan2023_abs_em.tb8BsE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1010&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2023_abs_em.Bvk6kQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1011&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Santos lied about where he went to high school.

He lied about where he went to college.

He lied about working at Goldman Sachs.

He lied about working at Citigroup. (Do people really lie about that?)

He lied about his criminal history of check fraud in Brazilian court
records. (That’s very specific.)

He lied about his real estate portfolio.

He lied about founding an animal charity. (How low does it get?)

He lied about his grandmother surviving the Holocaust. (Ok, it gets a lot
lower. That’s beyond despicable.)

He lied about being Jewish — or, as Santos later explained, “Jew-ish.”
(I’m not even going to comment on that.)

He lied about employing four victims who died in the Pulse nightclub
shooting. (Seriously, who does that?)

He may have even lied about his mother’s death being linked to 9/11.
(Ugh.)

George Santos has told a lot of lies to get where he is today. Which is
serving New York’s 3rd Congressional District in the House of
Representatives.

He has disgraced the House to an extraordinary degree. (And that’s really
saying something.)

But that’s just par for the course for MAGA Republicans these days. After
all, they learned from the master — the twice-impeached, disgraced former
president.

But Kevin McCarthy won’t do anything about it. Why? Because without
Santos, he can’t be Speaker. His whole position is dependent on liars and
fraudsters like George Santos.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em.lYGpWb&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230114_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1012&akid=1587%2E5257348%2EXYEG_a ]So let’s ensure this is the last time that either McCarthy or Santos is
in a position of power — send a $10 contribution to Adam’s campaign today
to expose these miscreants and help ensure that we have a House Majority
that puts the American people before their own personal self-interest.

Thanks for chipping in,

— Team Schiff

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

body:
| | | Peter, Every now and again, we have moments that define the fight for America’s future.

Patriots have to look in the mirror and ask themselves...

_Are they okay with the status quo?_

**Or are they ready to GIVE THEIR ALL for the conservative future our children deserve?**

**Right now is one of those moments, Peter.**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need to be able to count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18864?t=1001&akid=2894%2E346206%2E_yvdp5 ][IMG]

Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little
bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the
year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just
$20 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my
energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the
link: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18864?t=1002&akid=2894%2E346206%2E_yvdp5 ]https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18862?t=1003&akid=2894%2E346206%2E_yvdp5

Peter – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP
spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were
doubting whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising
investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were
making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might
that the funding will come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign
has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton
of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important
supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18864?t=1004&akid=2894%2E346206%2E_yvdp5 ]Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to help us retire our
debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker,
and I’d be grateful for anything you can give.

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now,
we just have to finish this thing off.

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230114-2894-footer&t=1005&refcode2=2894_346206__yvdp5&akid=2894%2E346206%2E_yvdp5

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2894%2E346206%2E_yvdp5

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Jayapal
subject: You are not an ATM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, Pramila wrote to you explaining why our team had to set a critical mid-month fundraising goal — because we’re already dramatically behind last year’s numbers. **Here’s why we’re asking for two minutes of your time and a donation.**
We’re not here to scare you into making a contribution. We won’t pretend that the world will end if we don’t meet this specific fundraising goal. In other words, there’s no catch. **But we do want you to know that emails like this have a real impact on our fundraising.**
That’s because messages just like this are one of the main ways we communicate with Pramila’s most active supporters, and it’s people like you that power our grassroots campaign year-round.
**Our goal is straightforward: raise exactly enough to get back on track with our performance last year.**
[**We have a little less than one day left to meet this goal, Peter, and we’re asking you to help us close the gap — will you donate now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25834?refcode=em20230114-2057&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2057%2E420207%2Eza7eJJ)
**[Chip in »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25834?refcode=em20230114-2057&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2057%2E420207%2Eza7eJJ)**
We don’t believe that our supporters are ATMs and that’s why we keep it real with you. Our fundraising is 70% behind pace, and that’s no small thing.
Every donation — no matter how big or small — adds up for us, and we take that seriously. Without you, we wouldn’t be able to maintain Pramila’s campaign as she fights for us all from the halls of Congress.
[**We’re asking you to stand with Pramila in this moment of need and pitch in to help us get back on track. Can you donate $3, or any amount, today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25834?refcode=em20230114-2057&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2057%2E420207%2Eza7eJJ)
Thank you for always supporting Pramila,
— Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230114-2057-footer&t=22&refcode2=2057_420207_za7eJJ&akid=2057%2E420207%2Eza7eJJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2057%2E420207%2Eza7eJJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2057%2E420207%2Eza7eJJ)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Our goal is straightforward: raise exactly enough to get back on track with our performance last year. We don’t believe that our supporters are ATMs and that’s why we keep it real with you. Our fundraising is 70% behind pace, and that’s no small thing. Every donation — no matter how big or small — adds up for us, and we take that seriously. Without you, we wouldn’t be able to maintain Pramila’s campaign as she fights for us all from the halls of Congress. Thank you for always supporting Pramila, — Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mississippi Republican Party
body:
| | | Fellow conservative, It isn’t easy being **_Red_**.

Being one of America’s last Conservative strongholds puts a BIG target on Mississippi’s back. Democrat super PACs pour money into our state at every chance they get to try and flip our agenda. But there’s one thing their dark money can’t change and that’s the will of our people.

The Mississippi GOP depends on patriots like you to protect our state with grassroots donations and loyalty. We manage to fight the liberal machine every day because you’re on our side.

With your help, we intend to accomplish even more this year than we did in 2022. In order to start strong, we need your help to meet our FIRST grassroots deadline of 2023.

Democrat super PACs pour money into our state at every chance they get to try and flip our agenda. But there’s one thing their dark money can’t change and that’s the will of our people. The Mississippi GOP depends on patriots like you to protect our state with grassroots donations and loyalty. We manage to fight the liberal machine every day because you’re on our side. With your help, we intend to accomplish even more this year than we did in 2022. In order to start strong, we need your help to meet our FIRST grassroots deadline of 2023. Thank You, Mississippi Conservatives | | Paid for by the Mississippi Republican Party | |

Throughout his time as governor, Andy has reached across the aisle to build a Kentucky where all can live and thrive. Andy has invested in our Commonwealth's infrastructure, created thousands of good-paying jobs, protected affordable health care, and led our state's economy through its best year on record.

**His accomplishments in moving Kentucky forward are why a new poll from _Morning Consult_ found Andy is the most popular Democratic governor in the nation!** 60% of Kentuckians approve of Andy's time in office.

Despite the majority of Kentuckians approving of Andy, his opponents are laser-focused on defeating him so they can undo the progress we've made for Kentucky. body:
Sharing the big news with you personally, friend
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57322296/387566158/714309240?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2185-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjZkY2Q4YS0yNDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOWuLpIJdFf0qqa6Ozv-gIdZjBEirTm9tx1HsFnfPMY=) I wanted to share the official news with you personally, friend:

**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support _today_ is so important.**

The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.

But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.

**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, friend. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**

**[Please, will you split $3 between my campaign and Maggie Hassan’s to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57322297/387566159/714309240?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2185-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjZkY2Q4YS0yNDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOWuLpIJdFf0qqa6Ozv-gIdZjBEirTm9tx1HsFnfPMY=)**

I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.

But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.

**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.[Please, friend, will you split $3 between my campaign and Maggie Hassan’s to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57322298/387566160/714309240?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2185-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjZkY2Q4YS0yNDk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VOWuLpIJdFf0qqa6Ozv-gIdZjBEirTm9tx1HsFnfPMY=)**
