With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high.**
State Democrats are facing _nearly a dozen_ special elections over the next two months – some of which are vital for Democratic control – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November.
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. **
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. **So can we count you in?**

clean_body: As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans | | | | | Our records show your official 2023 DLCC Membership is inactive. | SUPPORTER ID: 2023 Membership: INACTIVE Suggested Gift: $10 With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high. State Democrats are facing nearly a dozen special elections over the next two months – some of which are vital for Democratic control – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is critical to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. So can we count you in? body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8VG2r_R925F5C2aoZts0obNEaprnSUZ0yjB9_BwFx-WjmUVkerLgw6wcfxlxF5t6nkr8-etR0noQ8ZAx9uxKpAAFeDBX-Zs_F3ljDXX7pkNwe7CLvH4PK0zrr5bmTSHfhpyciw24o154e5CcriIqUuhx2_EZ_IHonZUxL0-tsLscxMguRG7OUj6RpTHxm_60O76pl4CSMY86CudOz_vLXJ8JEeTP0925YePQJVv_1nNJqbEGIYa2gfujG5oZWR4nKSGGMXqy8QSD9MXL5TNroTmegh-Kw_663a4Ux75BTx4QOs988fwUQk30eCl4EoRnwQ/3su/x7M4f9FfTqC2EOAKKTNHMg/h0/ak08DnheGhFlHSajLJsbmJydH8pPOhvMcEaqfVoD3xY) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAndzMcIrbisPir2uo0mBlAUivX9m2t_kVu5Mqg9NpTIkiUDy5VtVR95jFGw3dQgdZxmsklN9v5J6ZXHUSqe8afQaG7QxAVHmprU-P6RxpGIN7yTq1gegTxAfOWvC4pqq5OFfBmh5fsuCVHuFmb-616bVw96YQHE9ZbO2F30addnhpA0CaBrdq7nOtbjZ9QqUwDCuH34U9X6WdRYoS0N7uTRJrZtUGpUnxzGqmT3bjC1Z9Wd1I-aKb9nV18vb_A2doVFLPHz94e5sY2l9u4OcByn33PBVIky6kxhmvFDCkxRUmom0Xeblf8Q8x9swFKEM17nhUYrzoPaMo5uI-sJZlMw/3su/x7M4f9FfTqC2EOAKKTNHMg/h1/ShLiXn7154FD3uCrZQduBViGYBt0MaAJOrUzoLiBszs) Hey Peter, it’s Quentin.

While the GOP is wondering how they’ll sleep at night knowing they’re being held hostage by insurrectionists in their own party, **The Collective PAC is already gearing up to replace them with a long slate of 2024 Black progressive candidates.**

**Look, we believe our government works best when we have elected representatives that reflect and respect the diversity of our communities. That’s why we’re always #BuildingBlackPoliticalPower and working to unseat hate-filled GOP extremists.**

We’ve helped elect **HUNDREDS** of Black progressive champions at all levels of political office and we’ve got BIG plans to double our efforts in the next election cycle — _which starts NOW!_

[If you want to see more Black leaders unseating GOP extremists in 2024, please consider donating $25 or even just $10 to help The Collective PAC start our groundwork today→](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAndzMcIrbisPir2uo0mBlAUivX9m2t_kVu5Mqg9NpTIkiUDy5VtVR95jFGw3dQgdZxmsklN9v5J6ZXHUSqe8afXcX-AD5XNx_XoscwmNSEx7iFPBsU_6IN7RF7QmLKBSYWFnb99XWVvC8T2eifI1JFGQZhr9OYCTb1_6qKq2PgtV4UBeCODYwr7u-gHCCmxBLb_ILMu00-TGdj09fWrrnTIVRHueB2E9zVIVgvmqw-mjSk9VsKJMec8W4XcBWo4fSGGpyCmEZdzsM48TaQODmdcTJHDXc_4eo1-rrE439QpOSWCbVPvSn8tE_KyZM3we3e59yqJ8GasrOqg1QGqVrQQ/3su/x7M4f9FfTqC2EOAKKTNHMg/h2/J2ZdB4MVD4hQpO5qJDpWjlXByuE2XXuzKJPIh4_59fs) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express your donation will be processed immediately.

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hey Peter, it’s Quentin. While the GOP is wondering how they’ll sleep at night knowing they’re being held hostage by insurrectionists in their own party, The Collective PAC is already gearing up to replace them with a long slate of 2024 Black progressive candidates. Look, we believe our government works best when we have elected representatives that reflect and respect the diversity of our communities. That’s why we’re always #BuildingBlackPoliticalPower and working to unseat hate-filled GOP extremists. We’ve helped elect HUNDREDS of Black progressive champions at all levels of political office and we’ve got BIG plans to double our efforts in the next election cycle — which starts NOW! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Our mission is to educate, train, and fund Black candidates across the country to run against extremists who think the agenda of a twice-impeached failed President matters more than the needs of the American people. But, Peter, unlike the GOP and their MAGA donors, we are a grassroots-funded movement. Our candidates rely on donations from supporters like you to fund their campaigns. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you. Our work depends on supporters like you. Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57323833/387571997/390144955?source=DS_EM_EN_LO_230114_1_1&refcode2=68cc1eb5-2994-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&contactdata=Tv8qsKbI/8vNPF5MmAmYUBrGClLeBltzaa371yk4sApgsrRkxYO5ErEhRKEJei9IUt4j3hZdIYOE2ml/360JEA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4Y2MxZWI1LTI5OTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZSy2Rhn5r4ouPiF2yLCk6AegNwB0s60oHbn1VE6JKQ4=)

Peter,

This Monday, we will honor Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. with a Day of Service.

Dr. King dedicated his life to creating a more just and equitable society. His work ranged from small, community-level actions to the broader fight for systemic-wide changes.

We remember his legacy with a Day of Service to follow his example and take direct action to improve our own communities.

At Democrats Serve, we work to elect Democrats who dedicate their careers to the kind of service Dr. King inspired. Our candidates are public service pros who fight every day for the “beloved community” Dr. King dreamed of.

[To celebrate his legacy, we encourage you to find a volunteer opportunity near you and participate in the Day of Service this Monday.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57323834/387571998/-1518691263?source=DS_EM_EN_LO_230114_1_1&refcode2=68cc1eb5-2994-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&contactdata=Tv8qsKbI/8vNPF5MmAmYUBrGClLeBltzaa371yk4sApgsrRkxYO5ErEhRKEJei9IUt4j3hZdIYOE2ml/360JEA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4Y2MxZWI1LTI5OTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZSy2Rhn5r4ouPiF2yLCk6AegNwB0s60oHbn1VE6JKQ4=&emci=73cbebbb-7d93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=68cc1eb5-2994-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)

Can’t take Monday off to participate in person? [Democrats Serve is also honoring Dr. King by urging Congress to reintroduce and finally pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to restore some of the protections Dr. King fought for. Click here to add your name to our petition.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57323835/387571999/-1176420319?source=DS_EM_EN_LO_230114_1_1&refcode2=68cc1eb5-2994-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&contactdata=Tv8qsKbI/8vNPF5MmAmYUBrGClLeBltzaa371yk4sApgsrRkxYO5ErEhRKEJei9IUt4j3hZdIYOE2ml/360JEA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4Y2MxZWI1LTI5OTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZSy2Rhn5r4ouPiF2yLCk6AegNwB0s60oHbn1VE6JKQ4=&emci=73cbebbb-7d93-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=68cc1eb5-2994-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)

Thank you for taking the time to honor Dr. King and fight for the changes he dedicated his life to.

Brett Broesder

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Dear True American,

As the months ticked away in 2022, the state of our country continued to spiral out of control.

All hope seemed to be lost.

Until...

With a raised fist in the air, all our worries seemed to cool...

As President Trump announced his EPIC presidential run in 2024!

But you know what won't cool...?

Your coffee!

Because of this incredible announcement, we have decided to give away 250 of our high quality, double insulated [Trump Tumblers](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11255/6374453/cf7939888a05135300e14e5d0251fd05aecc0ada/82f7f1e341c4295b6f8381ae5a9d78df6825d42d) for **JUST USD10.**

This stainless steel, laser etched engraved "Trump 2024" **tumbler is yours for over 80% off** what we normally sell it for (USD49.99)...

'Weaponization' of the government? | | | Hi Peter – In case you didn't hear the news, the GOP is proposing a Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. This essentially means that **Republicans are designing a way for them to have more power over partisan investigations into the Biden administration**. It would also allow the GOP to oversee investigations into Donald Trump and his administration. "Weaponization" – you can already tell that the GOP is biased in its thinking and out to target one group only: Democrats. If the subcommittee moves forward, which would likely be chaired by the problematic and extreme Rep. Jim Jordan, Trump would have yet another ally in Congress to do his bidding and help him shrug off any accountability for his actions. This is just the latest in a series of ways that the Republican party is designing this Congress to benefit themselves instead of the American people. We need to protect the American people from this attack on democracy. ****[**Peter, will you chip in whatever you are able to help us protect blue areas in rural America, expand our reach, and support Democrats in clean_body: 'Weaponization' of the government? | | | Hi Peter – In case you didn't hear the news, the GOP is proposing a Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. This essentially means that Republicans are designing a way for them to have more power over partisan investigations into the Biden administration. It would also allow the GOP to oversee investigations into Donald Trump and his administration. "Weaponization" – you can already tell that the GOP is biased in its thinking and out to target one group only: Democrats. If the subcommittee moves forward, which would likely be chaired by the problematic and extreme Rep. Jim Jordan, Trump would have yet another ally in Congress to do his bidding and help him shrug off any accountability for his actions. This is just the latest in a series of ways that the Republican party is designing this Congress to benefit themselves instead of the American people. We need to protect the American people from this attack on democracy. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Thank you for all of your support. – United Rural Democrats HQ United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: An important milestone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We need a strong start.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15852%2E3422442%2E-gYVTa)
Derek,
**This first week of Katie’s Senate campaign is also our most important of the year.**
How much we’re able to raise this week will set the tone for the long fight ahead—and we’ll need _every single dollar_ to cement ourselves as the frontrunner in what promises to be an ultra-competitive and expensive primary.
**[We’re setting a Launch Week Goal: another 20,000 unique donations before 11:59 p.m. on Tuesday. Will you help us hit this meaningful goal and make your first donation to support Katie’s run for Senate?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15218?refcode=EMAF14_1_GOA_20230114_V1_F&t=2&akid=15852%2E3422442%2E-gYVTa)**
**[Become a Founding Donor ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15218?refcode=EMAF14_1_GOA_20230114_V1_F&t=3&akid=15852%2E3422442%2E-gYVTa)**
We've already seen tens of thousands of grassroots supporters pitch in to support Katie since she launched her campaign. It’s remarkable, and we’re so grateful.
We can’t win a state as big as California without supporters like you pitching in. Contributions of $10 or $20 are the only reason Katie was able to win three competitive House races and compete with nearly ten million in Republican super PAC spending this past year—and now we have to reach way more voters, with way more spending against us.
The stakes couldn’t be higher, Derek, so let’s start as strong as we can: **[Please donate $5 or more so we can reach our 20,000-donation Launch Week goal. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: You did it. Yep, you did! By donating to Aaron Rouse in a swing Virginia senate seat, the Blue Amp Action community helped Rouse WIN! More about the good news, and the mess the GOP House caucus are already making of things, inside our latest newsletter.
body:
What’s up? This ...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5521d0ef-0725-4749-b830-21e9c81303a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, To keep you in the know, here’s the newest edition of our newsletter! * You did it. Yep, you did! **By donating to Aaron Rouse in a swing Virginia senate seat, the Blue Amp Action community helped Rouse WIN!** He **took a formerly GOP-held seat and made the one anti-choice Dem in that body irrelevant** , giving us a 22-19 majority (21-20 for abortion rights) and ensured women will NOT be second class citizens in VA. AMAZING!! * **Democrat and veteran [Lucas Kunce launched his campaign against seditionist Senator Josh Hawley and destroyed the cowardly "running man"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T245626a9-6bee-44cc-8de0-a1febb664f1c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) right out of the gate!** [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NGPQZzjz3tE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0095fcff-34bc-4204-921e-7c7f6f4b26d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * You can [support Lucas Kunce’s campaign against the dangerous Sen. Hawley, right here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85b7a73f-788d-4f74-b4bd-17ad2eb616e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and help him build the early campaign momentum he’ll need to defeat the deep-pocketed donors backing Josh Hawley. _[[Have you visited our sponsor Dissent Pins yet?? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13489f09-e3b0-4e9d-85a4-5e0cb9ff473c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)Do you need a ["Mazel Tough" t-shirt? A Secret Jewish Laser Corps pin? A "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie" sticker or something from their Pride Collection?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2cf4e7b2-6456-4059-b456-9f446bd84ff3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It's all [here at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T057413d0-b897-4700-85cc-77dc4b9b5bed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)]_ * **More on George Santos, [who's Kevin McCarthy's "Blood Bag"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfad00098-b49a-43ea-bd1a-05ac80912930/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** & will stay around because of it. [He may also be a Russian spy](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6b31ed8-f4ae-4210-84e9-7727d07b8cf6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). No, really. At the very least, [their useful idiot](https://default.salsalabs.org/T214b591e-8411-4c0b-a541-901387cc7c18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). * Finally, the **Republican House mess--ie the 15 votes it took McCarthy to win, the secret deals he made with the biggest nutbags** , etc--[are rightly being ripped, even by conservative Republicans](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20325c0f-79e4-44ae-a70e-0b5e53070af5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-9m3Oyq_qS4](https://default.salsalabs.org/T692a6223-9cae-404a-9bc3-39c229e84d43/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [One final reminder: Go shop for gifts or yourself at our new sponsor, Dissent Pins! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfcf0d432-368a-4f34-bd08-cf9ed2c94962/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)They give half their profits to great causes, which comes out to nearly $1 million since they began. [You can get great items like Ukrainian Easter Egg earrings or a "Bigfoot & Chemtrails & UFOs Oh My" Conspiracy Theory Kit. Or, you can get this, one of the coolest presents I've ever gotten :)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T671e68f7-e92e-4078-b827-017377eecc19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T43dea3b6-0d13-49cb-beb4-84b7d7c4db45/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_I've loved wearing my Jewish Space Laser Corps t-shirt. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. The GOP isn’t taking any time off. They’re already pouring resources into Georgia to flip it back to **RED.**

Any donation we receive right now will help us build our voter outreach infrastructure across the _**whole state,**_ from Columbus to Carrollton, Macon to Milledgeville, Brunswick to Blue Ridge, Augusta to Albany, and everywhere in between. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Why I urgently need your support:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I had to personally reach out to ask for your urgent support ahead of tonight’s midnight fundraising deadline. Here’s why:
* Republicans only need to win two more seats to retake Senate control, and Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is reporting that they have a clear path to do just that.
* Here in New York, Republicans just had their best election cycle in _two decades_ — winning enough seats to deliver the House majority to the GOP. Now, they’re targeting my seat as a key pickup opportunity to flip the Senate next.
* **My team just let me know that we’re on track to fall short of tonight’s $25,000 fundraising goal, and missing a critical goal like this would signal to Mitch McConnell and the GOP that this seat is vulnerable.**

I know we can turn this around, but only if grassroots supporters like you step up right away. Please, friend, time is quickly running out: **[_Will you rush $5 or more right now to help me defeat the GOP in New York, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue fighting for the issues you care about most?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57338797/387602947/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3881-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDczMTliOS01Yjk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdJJg_gRLhw9Dko2ipodN-fUoTVlN9vhHJ3UXbmwVMw=)**

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I'll be straight with you, Derek:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We need to make sure that Democratic candidates have the resources they need to compete everywhere. | |
---
Derek, I'll be straight with you: A strong DNC is critical to building the nationwide party infrastructure we need to elect more Democrats and keep making meaningful progress for the American people. name: Team Zoe
subject: some thoughts on last week’s GOP debacle

body:
| | | After last week’s debacle made it clear: under a GOP majority, it’s clear we’re looking at two years of utter chaos in the House.

**In 2024, we can end that chaos. But making that happen depends on California Democrats.** [_Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can today to invest early in flipping crucial CA toss-up seats?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57325988/387581314/339029266?amount=10&sourceid=&refcode=LVF_EM_FR_3MO_20230114_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGUzMjY1OC0zMzk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFFP92PzvCyd6MjmPAntYoZ7_TUXlS8VfGFNs6YG1i0=)
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57325989/387581317/339029266?sourceid=&refcode=LVF_EM_FR_3MO_20230114_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGUzMjY1OC0zMzk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CFFP92PzvCyd6MjmPAntYoZ7_TUXlS8VfGFNs6YG1i0=)
---

It took Kevin McCarthy 15 tries to get his speaker’s gavel. That’s the longest it’s taken to elect a House speaker in more than a century, and it shined a glaring spotlight on Republicans’ disarray.

Unfortunately, this is just the beginning. **GOP infighting has created an utterly dysfunctional House of Representatives from Day One.** They’ve already passed new House rules that put more power in the hands of far-right extremists and threaten to make life harder for American families — and there’s no telling what they’ll do next.

But here’s the good news. The path back to a functional House of Representatives — one that puts people first, not political extremists — runs right through California. **_If we put in the work right now, we can flip multiple CA toss-up seats blue and play a crucial role to regain our Democratic majority._**

[_2024 might feel far away, but investing early is our best shot at building the movement to win. So can we count on you? Peter, Remember last week when that image was published of Marjorie Taylor Greene on a phone call with Donald Trump on the House floor? Let’s talk about that for a minute. Donald Trump is a plague on our politics that never seems to go away. Even though he lost his own election, he’s still infecting every part of Congress, and now has his extremist followers like Marjorie Taylor Greene walking him around the chamber, threatening other members into doing his bidding. And now that Marjorie will likely have a seat on the House Oversight Committee, she’ll have even _more_ power to do Trump’s bidding — like sham investigations into Nancy Pelosi and Hunter Biden. The QAnon Congresswoman is a danger to our democracy and women everywhere. body:
| | | Even though we successfully expanded our Senate majority, things are still precarious right now. With such a razor-thin margin, we cannot take a single vote -- or a single day -- for granted.

Our Senior Leadership Team has been reviewing the political landscape ahead, but we need reliable responses from voters so we don't make a mistake. **That's why we selected a few top Democrats to send our Grassroots Strategy Survey for our expanded Democratic majority's First 100 Days -- and you were selected.**

This is one of the DSCC's most exclusive focus groups, and you should feel proud to be chosen at this pivotal moment in American history. But with time running out before we lock in some of our most critical strategy decisions, it's vital that you share your input immediately.

| | USER ID: **9716520**
---
EMAIL: **[DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM](https://go.dscc.org/go/11622?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230114-InputNeeded-100DaysSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230114-InputNeeded-100DaysSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=9475%2E9716520%2E7D-lFz)**
STATUS: **SELECTED FOR HIGH-LEVEL SURVEY**
SURVEY COMPLETION: **INCOMPLETE**
CUSTOM LINK: **[www.dscc.org/GSS100days#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/11622?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230114-InputNeeded-100DaysSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230114-InputNeeded-100DaysSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=9475%2E9716520%2E7D-lFz)**

This survey will close at 11:59 p.m. tonight -- any responses received after that point will NOT be included in our update to our Senior Leadership Team. Please don't miss this moment -- we need you more than ever.

Here's your custom link again:
**[www.dscc.org/GSS100days#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/11622?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230114-InputNeeded-100DaysSurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230114-InputNeeded-100DaysSurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=9475%2E9716520%2E7D-lFz)**

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: This is an affront to our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
I almost couldn’t believe my eyes when I read this line, Peter: **“A Republican Elections Commissioner said he was proud of lower turnout in Milwaukee.”** _— Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ _Yes, you read that right._ Earlier this week, a Republican official _bragged_ about how right-wing voter suppression tactics specifically targeting Black and Hispanic voters led to 37,000 fewer votes cast in Milwaukee in the latest election compared to previous years. The fact that someone is not only taking credit for but also _celebrating_ efforts to dissuade people from voting is an affront to our democracy — and it shows just how far Wisconsin Republicans are willing to go to win. I’m outraged, Peter. An election official, regardless of party affiliation, should be working to make it easier and safer to vote — not harder. Suppressing votes, especially in historically marginalized communities, goes against everything our country stands for, **and I am more committed than ever before to making sure Wisconsinites can make their voices heard in our elections.** With a competitive Senate race on our horizon, it’s going to take all of us stepping up to stop voter suppression. Republicans have made it clear that they have no intention of stopping their attacks on our fundamental right to vote any time soon, which is why I’m asking: **Can you pitch in to my campaign’s efforts to protect the right to vote and turn out voters for the next two years? From the important Wisconsin Supreme Court race in April, all the way to the presidential election in 2024, I’m going to make every attempt to stop voter suppression and make sure every Wisconsinite can make their voice heard.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57327738/387587069/476042345?refcode2=test&amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20230114_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTdkMGUzMi0zYTk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aWZhYNi6ub5LTrbX_zK4NS-NR4SOyZln-sV8npGs6L4=)

That’s why we MUST take back the House in the next election and remove these extremists from power. = | = = = = = Thank you, Nancy Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click . | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

Last Saturday, I was sworn in as the new Democratic Leader.

Today, I promise you this: House Democrats will always fight for you and your family.

**But right now, I’m humbly asking you to fight with us.**
**[After Republicans’ historically dysfunctional start, everyone will be watching to see what kind of fundraising numbers Democrats post. The support you show in my first weeks as Leader is essential to reclaiming the House for Democrats so we can continue to deliver For The People. I’m asking: Will you rush $15, split between me and American Bridge PAC, to make this a historic fundraising period for Democrats? >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57328709/387590325/-1022007294?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2184-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmNzhlZDYyLTNlOTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KKUgFniG7NH-Jl2dxpNsXEZ0C-KM6MpXPdm02-alEsE=)**
Here’s the deal:

Speaker McCarthy is rushing to outraise us to prove that we don’t have what it takes to reclaim the Majority.

**We’re going to prove him absolutely wrong, friend.**

Which is why we need a powerful surge of support – 1,000 gifts in my first crucial days as Leader – to kick this year off with a strong foundation for victory, outraise extreme MAGA Republicans and hand them their first upset of the year.

Can I count on you to step up in this defining moment?

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Press Release Protect Parental Rights House Bill 1507
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Protect Parental Rights
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 14 th, 2022
McGuire Introduces Legislation to Protect Fundamental Rights of Parents RICHMOND, VA -Delegate John McGuire has announced House Bill 1507, requiring school boards to document how new policies comply with Virginia state law, regarding the fundamental right of parents to make decisions concerning the upbringing, education, and care of the parent's child. "Virginia parents deserve a say in their children's education. During the 2021 election fellow Virginians showed how much this matters to us, and after all the difficulties school boards have given parents in exercising this right the last two to three years, it's time the parents get some power back." - Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10.
"Parental rights legislation, HB 1507, is common sense legislation that strikes a balance between the school boards' responsibility to ensure students in the district receive a quality education, and a parent's right to hold the school board accountable, if they begin to lose sight of their responsibility. If school boards are respecting parents' rights, as written in VA law, then they should have no concerns with this legislation." - Craig DiSesa, Executive Director of the Virginia Education Opportunity Alliance.
You can find the legislation online and read the bill text [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZS-x2Gfofb8Ll2jxaXPaJb5jAxMZfRDPE9U0uSTuHKpRHGlYjN9Ne5VVV9y61R8KrtVm4_B4UOi7FhiArgz-gXsRh-zu-DJ-7wDgC7ZOCmfh7FzdujebXiHEXmawacvnKKyG7aweeoJVosfPkoHzDgRHbdcll3lMrgYYsHBaMZQDpNN5FV4b7vlIq47IHB3SI5y-OaE2pkQ=&c=025hYSYTREn2xrcQnW_N2XgzCljrOpVU95yUXEMHp0l5zw7wwrTo1Q==&ch=8maplp_itwmkFRYPzBm00Y0vFx6rqMwzrLbXZAX1T93LOPM_DtSt1A==). ### Contact: [Press@mcguireforvirginia.com](mailto:Press@mcguireforvirginia.com)

subject: We need to hit the ground running in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
As we kick off 2023, we can't afford to miss our first mid-month fundraising goal.
Peter - did you see Kevin's last email?

If we're going to push back against newly-elected Speaker Kevin McCarthy -- _and_ his MAGA loyal colleagues -- we can't afford to miss a single fundraising goal we set. Tonight is the _first_ fundraising deadline of the new year, and every dollar we can raise before midnight will go toward helping Derek fight for us in the House.

**[Will you help Derek hit the ground running in 2023 by chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can? Every little bit goes a long way.](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEN0dvSIAoXV5J7CWAs_X013nubCjnJlE-ODFcbp6cA=/9WNyq6uC5bmN4woPlrlIaV2h0ghAQcQmtZIcTn8cJU8=?refcode=em23_230114_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230114_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})**

[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEN0dvSIAoXV5J7CWAs_X013nubCjnJlE-ODFcbp6cA=/9WNyq6uC5bmN4woPlrlIaV2h0ghAQcQmtZIcTn8cJU8=?refcode=em23_230114_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230114_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Kevin Schilling, Team Kilmer
Date: Thurs, Jan 12, 2023
Subject: What Kevin McCarthy's messy bid for Speaker tells us:

Team,

**FIRST:** Derek won reelection and headed back to Congress this month to represent our region.

**THEN:** Derek and the rest of the nation watched as Republicans rejected Rep. Kevin McCarthy's bid for House Speaker __15 times__ , marking the first time in 100 years that the Speaker of the House election has required more than one floor vote.

**NOW:** It's clear these next two years are going to be an uphill battle. But, Derek is more than ready to go to bat for Social Security, working people, and our freedoms no matter what the Republican majority throws our way.

We're coming up on our first mid-month fundraising deadline of 2023. If we plan to help Democrats regain the House majority in 2024 to get Congress back on track, we need to start building power now.

**[Will you consider donating $10, $5, or whatever you can to help Derek reach our mid-month goal? We're counting on your support, and every dollar makes a difference.](https://act.myngp.com/el/nEN0dvSIAoXV5J7CWAs_X013nubCjnJlE-ODFcbp6cA=/9WNyq6uC5bmN4woPlrlIaV2h0ghAQcQmtZIcTn8cJU8=?refcode=em23_230114_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230114_mm2_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})**

Kevin Schilling
Political Director, Team Kilmer

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! KICKING OFF the 2023 strong!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: 2023 KICKOFF! | 4 New Organizing Teams! | Congrats Bernie | US
Rep Greg Casar Rallies Fellow Our Rev Members | Raise the Wage Launch |
Power for Grabs in Major Cities | St. Louis Basic Income | Party Takeover
| & MORE!

★ ★ ★

2023 KICKOFF!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1011&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

Thanks to the great work of our members and our movement, Our Revolution
is kicking off the new year strong in 2023!

Because we held the Senate by electing John Fetterman and Raphael Warnock,
Bernie’s taking the helm at the powerful HELP Committee (healthcare,
education, labor and pensions).

On the House side, our electoral organizing helped elect NINE new
progressives who will make the largest Congressional Progressive Caucus
ever since Bernie founded it in 1991.

Not only that, we passed sectoral bargaining for fast food workers in
California, increased funding to the NLRB, and killed Manchin’s Dirty Deal
three times

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1012&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

This year, we will build on our work and our inside-outside strategy —
deepening our grassroots organizing, electing more allies, and growing our
influence in the party.

Our Revolution members and activists were joined on Monday by progressive
leaders like new US Rep. Greg Casar to lay out the mission on our LIVE
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8219?t=1013&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]Organize-to-Win 2023 Kickoff Call.

From building out progressive cities in down ballot races to raising wages
state by state, we have lots of exciting work planned for 2023.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1014&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]This is a year we can make serious gains as a movement. The more of us
organizing together, the greater our impact. Become a 2023 Member now to
power this work for the year ahead.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1015&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

FEDERAL ACTION

Although Republicans control the House, there’s still much we can do to
advance our policy agenda in 2023 — including ramping up pressure for
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8220?t=1016&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]federal action.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1017&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

Our Revolution member and new Congressman Greg Casar [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8219?t=1018&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]joined our LIVE
Kickoff Call between votes on the House floor, where he told us
Republicans were “trying to seem like populists but the first bill I just
voted ‘no’ on is trying to help the wealthy evade taxes.”

Republicans are making it clear they’re willing to shut down Congress over
cuts to Social Security and Medicare, Greg said, “but we must refuse to
allow any deal that would balance the budget on the backs of the sick, our
seniors, and struggling everyday people.”

Not only must we fight the far right, we must also use our power to
“incentivize the good and push back on the bad of the Democratic party
itself,” Greg said. “We need to work on executive action.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1019&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

In 2022, we got steps on climate, drug pricing, and more through
legislation. Now, with a Republican House, we must push President Biden to
deliver more through the power of the pen.

Just to name a few: Biden can use his executive authority to give paid
sick leave to rail workers, ensure union rights for federal contractors,
and close tax loopholes for the wealthy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1020&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

And although establishment Democrats and progressives stood together
during the first Congressional votes this year, we are going to push to
make sure our priorities get addressed in 2023.

“I don’t think this show of unity should create any illusion that
progressives are going to pull their punches,” Our Revolution Executive
Director Joseph Geevarghese told the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8221?t=1021&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]AP. “There’s an old organizing
adage, ’No permanent allies, no permanent enemies, only permanent
interests.’ There’s a conversation that’s been happening where progressive
have an opening with Joe Biden to press our priorities.”

Join the Federal Action Team to help us develop strategy and build
pressure on Congress and the White House to deliver for American families
in 2023!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8220?t=1022&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]JOIN OUR FEDERAL ACTION TEAM

★ ★ ★

RAISE THE WAGE!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1023&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

Also on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8219?t=1024&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]2023 Kickoff Call, One Fair Wage President Saru Jayaraman
discussed the racist history of tipped wages and set out a roadmap for us
to raise wages for millions this year.

It’s been a hard fight as the National Restaurant Association has wielded
so much power over both parties. But, Saru told us, with the pandemic
everything changed.

“Tips went way down because sales went down, harassment went way up, and
millions of workers reached their breaking point, leaving the industry,”
she said. “So, restaurants started raising wages and now we have an
historic moment where we’re winning.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1025&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

Last year in Michigan, restaurant workers won a full minimum wage — the
8th state to end the subminimum wage for tipped workers. And, in DC, 76%
voted to raise the wage to $16.75.

“We’re on a roll,” Saru said on our call, launching our campaign to end
the subminimum wage in 10 states in 2023 — NY, MD, MA, CT, RI, VT, HA, CO,
PR and CA.

We’ll also be collecting signatures this year to put the measure on the
ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in 2024. We have a chance to help millions of
workers in each state win higher wages.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1026&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]JOIN OUR RAISE THE WAGE TEAM

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1027&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

The Raise the Wage team is already getting started! If you’re near Albany,
NY, join Our Revolution and One Fair Wage to rally at the introduction of
a state bill to End the Subminimum Wage for tipped workers! The event
kicks off at 11 am ET, Monday January 23rd.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8217?t=1028&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]RSVP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1029&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

BUILD LOCAL POWER

While we prepare to take out Kyrsten Sinema in 2024 — unlike other groups
— we’re not skipping critical races in 2023.

The balance of power is up for grabs this year in major cities all across
America, and we plan to elect progressive city leaders in St. Louis,
Chicago, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas and more.

Local seats are a proving ground for progressive leaders — remember,
Bernie started off as a mayor in Vermont!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1030&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

On our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8219?t=1031&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]Kickoff Call, St. Louis Board of Aldermen President Megan Green
told us about the basic income pilot program passed by our progressive
bloc and the need to build local power.

“Our progressive majority in St. Louis got off to a running start, but
success came from our coalitions with racial justice orgs, unions, public
schools,” Megan said. “A lot of policies start locally, and that can push
state and federal policy.”

Our Revolution helped Megan win a special election in November, and now
she’ll be working with us to make sure we keep progressives leading the
city in the spring election.

“We have more work to do in St. Louis — tax incentive reform, labor peace
agreements, tenants’ and homeless bills of rights — all contingent on
maintaining that progressive majority,” she said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1032&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

Megan and our St. Louis bloc are proving why it’s so important to build
local power. If you want to help keep our majority in St. Louis and build
out more progressive cities this year — sign up for our new organizing
team!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1033&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1034&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1035&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

California Dems Progressive Caucus Chair Amar Shergill joined our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8219?t=1036&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]2023
Kickoff Event to talk about progressive power in the party and,
specifically, the ongoing election for party delegates in his state.

Our Revolution is working with Amar and the CA Progressive Caucus to grow
the number of progressive delegates. The establishment knows what’s at
stake — and the lobbyists don’t want us to win — so we need everyone in CA
to go to [ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8230?t=1037&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]PDN.vote, then show up and vote!

Endorsed candidates include Our Revolution’s own Timothy Cotran, who is
running with a slate of progressives in AD-53! Even if you’re not in CA,
you can join us Wednesday for an [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8225?t=1038&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]important phone bank to help get them
elected!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1039&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

“If you like Ro Khanna, Katie Porter, Barbara Lee — they got elected
because of party endorsements and progressive delegates,” Amar explained,
noting the impact on the CA Senate race. “We know Feinstein is not coming
back, so we’re going to replace her and it's going to be a progressive.”

As Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8226?t=1040&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]Politico
this week, “places like California present an opportunity to grow a
progressive voting bloc in the Senate, just like we’ve worked to build on
the House side.”

Meanwhile, in Florida, the state party chair has resigned because
“progressives stood up and said we’ve got to change,” Amar said. “We see
what that pressure has brought. And, the pushbank we’re seeing is a clear
sign that what we’re doing is working!”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1041&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

The corporate wing is using any tactic they can to push back against the
growing power of progressives they’re seeing at every level of the party
across the country.

If you’re involved with the party already — or if you want to help grow
pressure and board the ship to make the party more responsive and less
hostile to the grassroots — take action with us now for the new year!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8227?t=1042&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]JOIN OUR PARTY TRANSFORMATION TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1043&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

In NY State, Our Revolution-NYPAN and the Replace Jay Jacobs coalition
organized a big press event last week on the steps of NY City Hall to say
loud and clear that it’s time to #FixTheNYDems

We’re demanding Jacobs be fired as State Party Chair after his actions led
directly to NY getting crushed in the midterms, losing 5 winnable seats —
including to serial liar George Santos — and giving the U.S. House to
Republicans.

We were joined by NY Sens. Jessica Ramos and Robert Jackson, Assembly
Members Harvey Epstein and Robert Carroll, NYC Public Advocate Jumaane
Williams, and NYC Council Member Christopher Marte.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8218?t=1044&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ][IMG]

improve Medicare!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8228?t=1048&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]RSVP HERE

The corporate wing of the Party knows what’s at stake in the California

The lobbyists don’t want our slate of progressive candidates to take power
in the party, and doing so will help us in the upcoming Senate race. If
you’re in California, go to [ http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8230?t=1050&akid=3881%2E5885482%2EitB-cH ]PDN.vote, and make sure to vote!

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Insider News from the Political Revolution! HEADLINES: 2023 KICKOFF! | 4 New Organizing Teams! | Congrats Bernie | US Rep Greg Casar Rallies Fellow Our Rev Members | Raise the Wage Launch | Power for Grabs in Major Cities | St. Louis Basic Income | Party Takeover | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ 2023 KICKOFF! [ ][IMG] Thanks to the great work of our members and our movement, Our Revolution is kicking off the new year strong in 2023! Because we held the Senate by electing John Fetterman and Raphael Warnock, Bernie’s taking the helm at the powerful HELP Committee (healthcare, education, labor and pensions). On the House side, our electoral organizing helped elect NINE new progressives who will make the largest Congressional Progressive Caucus ever since Bernie founded it in 1991. Not only that, we passed sectoral bargaining for fast food workers in California, increased funding to the NLRB, and killed Manchin’s Dirty Deal three times [ ][IMG] This year, we will build on our work and our inside-outside strategy — deepening our grassroots organizing, electing more allies, and growing our influence in the party. Our Revolution members and activists were joined on Monday by progressive leaders like new US Rep. Greg Casar to lay out the mission on our LIVE [ ]Organize-to-Win 2023 Kickoff Call. From building out progressive cities in down ballot races to raising wages state by state, we have lots of exciting work planned for 2023. [ ]This is a year we can make serious gains as a movement. The more of us organizing together, the greater our impact. Become a 2023 Member now to power this work for the year ahead. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ FEDERAL ACTION Although Republicans control the House, there’s still much we can do to advance our policy agenda in 2023 — including ramping up pressure for [ ]federal action. [ ][IMG] Our Revolution member and new Congressman Greg Casar [ ]joined our LIVE Kickoff Call between votes on the House floor, where he told us Republicans were “trying to seem like populists but the first bill I just voted ‘no’ on is trying to help the wealthy evade taxes.” Republicans are making it clear they’re willing to shut down Congress over cuts to Social Security and Medicare, Greg said, “but we must refuse to allow any deal that would balance the budget on the backs of the sick, our seniors, and struggling everyday people.” Not only must we fight the far right, we must also use our power to “incentivize the good and push back on the bad of the Democratic party itself,” Greg said. “We need to work on executive action.” [ ][IMG] In 2022, we got steps on climate, drug pricing, and more through legislation. Now, with a Republican House, we must push President Biden to deliver more through the power of the pen. Just to name a few: Biden can use his executive authority to give paid sick leave to rail workers, ensure union rights for federal contractors, and close tax loopholes for the wealthy. [ ][IMG] And although establishment Democrats and progressives stood together during the first Congressional votes this year, we are going to push to make sure our priorities get addressed in 2023. “I don’t think this show of unity should create any illusion that progressives are going to pull their punches,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told the [ ]AP. “There’s an old organizing adage, ’No permanent allies, no permanent enemies, only permanent interests.’ There’s a conversation that’s been happening where progressive have an opening with Joe Biden to press our priorities.” Join the Federal Action Team to help us develop strategy and build pressure on Congress and the White House to deliver for American families in 2023! [ ]JOIN OUR FEDERAL ACTION TEAM ★ ★ ★ RAISE THE WAGE! [ ][IMG] Also on our [ ]2023 Kickoff Call, One Fair Wage President Saru Jayaraman discussed the racist history of tipped wages and set out a roadmap for us to raise wages for millions this year. It’s been a hard fight as the National Restaurant Association has wielded so much power over both parties. But, Saru told us, with the pandemic everything changed. “Tips went way down because sales went down, harassment went way up, and millions of workers reached their breaking point, leaving the industry,” she said. “So, restaurants started raising wages and now we have an historic moment where we’re winning.” [ ][IMG] Last year in Michigan, restaurant workers won a full minimum wage — the 8th state to end the subminimum wage for tipped workers. And, in DC, 76% voted to raise the wage to $16.75. “We’re on a roll,” Saru said on our call, launching our campaign to end the subminimum wage in 10 states in 2023 — NY, MD, MA, CT, RI, VT, HA, CO, PR and CA. We’ll also be collecting signatures this year to put the measure on the ballot in AZ, OH, and MI in 2024. We have a chance to help millions of workers in each state win higher wages. [ ]JOIN OUR RAISE THE WAGE TEAM [ ][IMG] The Raise the Wage team is already getting started! If you’re near Albany, NY, join Our Revolution and One Fair Wage to rally at the introduction of a state bill to End the Subminimum Wage for tipped workers! The event kicks off at 11 am ET, Monday January 23rd. If you want to help keep our majority in St. Louis and build out more progressive cities this year — sign up for our new organizing team! name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: here's what's next for us...
body:
RE: Saving Idaho from the full-blown leftist assault |
---
| | I figured I'd let you know...

I just finished my first week "in-session" as an Idaho state Senator.

And there are a lot of fights brewing.

The fight for _**our way of life**_...

The fight for **_our conservative values_**...

Probably most importantly, the fight **_FOR OUR KIDS_**.

[Here's my 7-minute video update if you're interested](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=1890a0b683&e=dea908e0fe "what you need to know")

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=b3689ebb72&e=dea908e0fe)

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s.**

Can you take a few seconds (literally) to email the chairman of the House Tax Committee and let him know you want him to hear my bill to get rid of the grocery tax?

Here's his email (be nice): [jmonks@house.idaho.gov](mailto:jmonks@house.idaho.gov)

Republicans may have taken over control of the House but the work of stopping their bigoted agenda is just heating up. Democrats are prepared to stand united and be the firewall we need to stop Kevin McCarthy and the Congressional Republicans in their tracks.
And if this first week of Republican leadership has shown anything, it’s that our Democratic stronghold needs to be fully operational each and every day. Republicans have already spent their first week in power sending dangerous legislation to the House floor. From anti-abortion bills to bills intended to help the wealthy avoid paying their fair share in taxes, they have made it clear they will stop at nothing to pander to their base with divisive and harmful policies.
Lisa is not afraid to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and the radicals in his caucus in order to make sure the voices of Delawareans are heard in Washington – but she needs your help to keep going.
**[Our very first mid-month deadline hits in just 5 hours. This is our first chance to show Republicans that we’re not backing down in the fight for true progress across our country. That means our team has just 5 hours left to hit our crucial goal of $472. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **= | | = | = | | = | = | | = Republicans may have taken over control of the House but the work of stopping their bigoted agenda is just heating up. Democrats are prepared to stand united and be the firewall we need to stop Kevin McCarthy and the Congressional Republicans in their tracks. And if this first week of Republican leadership has shown anything, it’s that our Democratic stronghold needs to be fully operational each and every day. Republicans have already spent their first week in power sending dangerous legislation to the House floor. From anti-abortion bills to bills intended to help the wealthy avoid paying their fair share in taxes, they have made it clear they will stop at nothing to pander to their base with divisive and harmful policies. Lisa is not afraid to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and the radicals in his caucus in order to make sure the voices of Delawareans are heard in Washington – but she needs your help to keep going. = = Let's keep fighting, LBR HQ Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. This week, Congressmen Waltz and Crenshaw introduced legislation to give President Biden the military authority to combat the cartels endangering our southern border. Waltz told Fox News Digital that the resolution is needed because the cartels "have exceeded the capability of law enforcement" and are a "paramilitary arm armed with armored vehicles, heavy weapons, and billions at their disposal." "And we've even seen collaboration with international terrorist groups and the Chinese Communist Party with these groups," Waltz said in a Wednesday phone interview. "So, we believe that we need to start using military assets to address this national security threat." Waltz pointed to the U.S.’s "tremendous success" with Plan Colombia under former President Clinton and America needs to look at the issue of cartels as a national security issue, not a law enforcement issue. Read more about their joint resolution [here.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=f92c40b9ad1646a8b71d969e148ebde6&_e=41V_Z8LxLHaieL5uwmZCeSf_5cDN5cBCejM29jMi0Vxe9pZOpdCoIHTRIAjVJZC-4UH834V8XNeo8MkFUq7mZwqzmkqdEQNPcS_P_vU6Nx5WW6Spg1iqEKOmcQk3OGwKCAPtC2TYHiA2vpen42a4dKH54axO-tQcMefLeBoCBre38nh6qipi-H-kkMmuGVgdTcyu4yd5eAIZrVF0pOIiasg7QWLNyBF3BLwfYeZWAoDTVCZmZBOZYTiGlqAbmp156IHmpFRk3q0gFeA_0XuHNM08xS6YCrdy5Xd1eiud9xbZLQ_0eSL3bcDerrWnViND0lJsP-tDnNSLjrZMZ0jn3SbmGMlpxAZTw2ZmiCRx-q4O2FG5uGne2tXqHSsb-w9oivIGKSpD7YVwDZPzQQO-Mhknkflwtobxi0CB1lXCaRo%3D)

clean_body: | | | | | Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe in the new year! From introducing Authorization for Use of Military Force legislation at the southern border to discussing the classified documents found at Biden's private office, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week. | In the News WALTZ ON FIGHTING BACK AGAINST THE CARTELS This week, Congressmen Waltz and Crenshaw introduced legislation to give President Biden the military authority to combat the cartels endangering our southern border. Waltz told Fox News Digital that the resolution is needed because the cartels "have exceeded the capability of law enforcement" and are a "paramilitary arm armed with armored vehicles, heavy weapons, and billions at their disposal." "And we've even seen collaboration with international terrorist groups and the Chinese Communist Party with these groups," Waltz said in a Wednesday phone interview. "So, we believe that we need to start using military assets to address this national security threat." Waltz pointed to the U.S.’s "tremendous success" with Plan Colombia under former President Clinton and America needs to look at the issue of cartels as a national security issue, not a law enforcement issue. Read more about their joint resolution WALTZ ON PROTECTING THE SOUTHERN BORDER On Sunday, Mike Waltz kicked off the week by joining Maria Bartiromo on to discuss California Rep. Kevin McCarthy's election to the House speakership, the Republican Party's goals for Congress moving forward and Biden's first border visit.. "Trump is absolutely right: Mexican Cartels are paramilitary groups running our Southern Border & defeating the Mexican Army. That’s why I’ll be introducing Authorization for Use of Military Force (AUMF) legislation to go on the offense with military, cyber, intel & drones." Watch the entire interview for yourself WALTZ ON BIDEN DOCUMENTS On Tuesday, Mike was on to discuss the classified documents found at President Biden's private office. "How long have the classified documents found in Biden's office been sitting around? Have they been there since his vice presidency? Who had access to them all of this time? Where is the FBI raid?" Watch the entire segment WALTZ ON DOUBLE STANDARDS FOR BIDEN On Wednesday morning, Mike joined to weigh in the double standard between the handling of investigations into Biden and Trump. "President Trump's lawyers weren't allowed to be in the rooms as the FBI rummaged around Mar-a-lago, but yet we are expected to take everything that Biden's lawyers say at face value ." Watch the clip Essential Mission Brief Reading Store Our Online Store is live! If you haven't checked it out yet, . You can find all the Waltz Warriors shirts, hats, stickers, yard signs, and now...koozies! | Social Media Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Mike remember to use #WaltzWarriors! | | | | | | That's it for this week. Thanks for all of you support and stay tuned for more! Be sure to follow Mike on social media! | | ---|--- | | Paid for by Michael Waltz For Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. Not just at legislating, but messaging what we're about in contrast to Republicans. **_After only three days of chaotic, corrupt, incompetent GOP rule, Jeffries said this to "leader-lite" McCarthy: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea0c4028-88b4-4936-9338-686cebf601f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te81db606-588e-4dfc-a87f-db0302ba6601/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Rep. Jim Banks
subject: Biden’s Border Plan boiled down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Banks for Congress
body:
I need you to act fast

| [ ](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=3918090ef7e04b5ba73a9c7289ec7954&_e=qKpn2mpERkIrnBJr7Lt5odDtUAqT_pgh6g8g5wvzhsTvZQEs4whKo7QgtdBXmkZ8ApI3Zxir6VkGsQvMeZcztPScfdfroqQrRt0hbQvF3Y66aojyx2z-B0H9zTEli5qGIdAxsHhxwST9scNx-Nxzes5pmnyX4NgbY28qbvgRj4irzTh18JZhJDIe6DT-yEVT5fvh4r-Uatr6OU6IsCn0cMOJNABzxWsG6FRmF-qTui5h0nHndgG63YkQQVGMa3iXCD1TDxnXVirqLH3IWQE2Szt3I2ME31ZlVABw4divZQc0r3LiYxZoYq96L3N1haykODhmDKyDpI8F7jDnfNDXye0hkn3QZvcfGejPjogiCDygGKHH5JLL1BXlSCoI9DoBNyhjnchYKJCY3DHj6i9983BZNlOeF-xpauRRnmC_mFu6ncs9yqjzLQzO6gLErCkcuceUkh2NmsyvqIXRkinDs6609RTH1kOwa2jvrzT1G1qt1TP89u14DAZkozCALtwRJ9kk3Jc-PPltE9_gbnT1MA%3D%3D)

---
Dear Friend,

Let me simplify Biden’s Border Plan for you:

1. Open the border
2. Ignore the crisis
3. Blame Republicans

This plan is **COWARDLY** and **DEVASTATING** for the future of our country. I am fighting in Congress to take down this cowardly plan, but I need your help.

**To:_Dr. Anthony Fauci_**
**Signature:_Not Received_**

Team, Dr. Anthony Fauci just retired from government after over **_50 YEARS_** of public service!

Dr. Fauci has devoted his entire career to serving our country. He's guided us through MULTIPLE public health crises, including the COVID-19 pandemic -- but despite his decades of service, **Republicans have continued to attack and smear his reputation!**

That’s why we're organizing a MASSIVE thank you card to stand with Dr. Fauci and let him know how grateful we are for his decades of service. But we need 16 more Democrats from Pennsylvania to sign on if we're going to hit our 50,000 signature goal! **Please, before the midnight deadline:**

[**Click here to sign the card and thank Dr. Fauci for his _decades_ of public service! >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11607?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230114-AddYourName-FauciRetirement-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230114-AddYourName-FauciRetirement-Pros-sl1&akid=9439%2E9716520%2ECPCN_D)

subject: We the People are done with a broken DC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Americans suffer! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/we-are-done-with-a-broken-dc-2473185?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ce95761fa3&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

**The House leadership and conference must put Americans First.**
America Last means ignoring the deaths of your own people and ignoring the misery in the streets caused by open borders, but sending $100 billion to protect another country's border.
[_**I was elected by the people of Arizona because we are done with a broken DC. The people suffer from rigged elections & high inflation**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=81cc96f524&e=645b3b1338)**.**

Our tax money is sent to foreign governments to protect their borders while ours allows 5 million illegals in 2 years.

**We are under a sustained invasion.**
As fentanyl kills our people, our southern border remains wide open.

Not one penny in the spending bill to secure our border. But another $45 billion for Ukraine's border. It's time we put America First for a change. [_**While I am fighting the swamp, the swamp is fighting back. They want to take me out. Again**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0dec96a4eb&e=645b3b1338).

We have elections in which both democrats and Republicans agree are riddled with incompetence, fraud, or both. We have a completely rigged system with election interference by the DOJ and the FBI against American citizens and against President Trump in particular. That's why I need your support today. I still owe legal fees to the attorneys that helped me in court when the Radical Left sued me to keep me off the ballot. I used what little campaign money I had left to get reelected. Now I am in debt and need your help. I've fought for America First, and I've fought for the American people. **[Donate $25, $50, or even $100 today. Your contribution will go a long way](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c38a02d925&e=645b3b1338)**. I want to keep fighting for you. Stand with me today. [**_CONTRIBUTE $250_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7e62bd713d&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE $100_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=85b5c304b7&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE $50 _**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f33c9ef185&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=886d1efa69&e=645b3b1338) _**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b6b947bb49&e=645b3b1338)**_
Respectfully,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b572522216&e=645b3b1338) Paul Gosar, D.D.S.

clean_body: Americans suffer! | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, The House leadership and conference must put Americans First. America Last means ignoring the deaths of your own people and ignoring the misery in the streets caused by open borders, but sending $100 billion to protect another country's border. . Our tax money is sent to foreign governments to protect their borders while ours allows 5 million illegals in 2 years. We are under a sustained invasion. As fentanyl kills our people, our southern border remains wide open. Not one penny in the spending bill to secure our border. But another $45 billion for Ukraine's border. It's time we put America First for a change. . We have elections in which both democrats and Republicans agree are riddled with incompetence, fraud, or both. We have a completely rigged system with election interference by the DOJ and the FBI against American citizens and against President Trump in particular. That's why I need your support today. I still owe legal fees to the attorneys that helped me in court when the Radical Left sued me to keep me off the ballot. I used what little campaign money I had left to get reelected. Now I am in debt and need your help. I've fought for America First, and I've fought for the American people. . I want to keep fighting for you. Stand with me today. Respectfully, Paul Gosar, D.D.S. | | PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Paul Gosar for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: It's time to cut soot pollution. Act now to deliver cleaner air for our families and communities.
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/9zEZM8wGXgJm/UlkyT3BZbktIdWk4Z1lxZ04zdWQ2NkhCVDkyd2lUZHk1dWtOZHNtVlVUQ0FVbURVZlFWcUN3b3BCQm1FSDNyL1Nwd0pLMUluZWZXeGliaU85bHY5VkZoRWNFN09jcEpxQ0t0bFJZaUE2SFU9S0/cVpac3NlMTVJK0FFTzJ3dCsvSFJQVXROU3VydkRPS1JPQm5nNDlRV25KajNhZkpuRjFQSUdFN1M0L09CcTBYelZuSzJTZHMyUXJSa2djUTVtNXB0TVE9PQS2 ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_yzTwG~bmFW/UlkyT3BZbktIdWk4Z1lxZ04zdWQ2NkhCVDkyd2lUZHk1dWtOZHNtVlVUQ0FVbURVZlFWcUN3b3BCQm1FSDNyL1Nwd0pLMUluZWZXeGliaU85bHY5VkZoRWNFN09jcEpxQ0t0bFJZaUE2SFU9S0/cVpac3NlMTVJK0FFTzJ3dCsvSFJQVXROU3VydkRPS1JPQm5nNDlRV25KajNhZkpuRjFQSUdFN1M0L09CcTBYelZuSzJTZHMyUXJSa2djUTVtNXB0TVE9PQS2

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/8wqzCNEp4bBz/UlkyT3BZbktIdWk4Z1lxZ04zdWQ2NkhCVDkyd2lUZHk1dWtOZHNtVlVUQ0FVbURVZlFWcUN3b3BCQm1FSDNyL1Nwd0pLMUluZWZXeGliaU85bHY5VkZoRWNFN09jcEpxQ0t0bFJZaUE2SFU9S0/cVpac3NlMTVJK0FFTzJ3dCsvSFJQVXROU3VydkRPS1JPQm5nNDlRV25KajNhZkpuRjFQSUdFN1M0L09CcTBYelZuSzJTZHMyUXJSa2djUTVtNXB0TVE9PQS2

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9092966&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDMxMzExMQS2&spReportId=MTY2MDMxMzExMQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9092966&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDMxMzExMQS2&spReportId=MTY2MDMxMzExMQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMX-REpfY/UlkyT3BZbktIdWk4Z1lxZ04zdWQ2NkhCVDkyd2lUZHk1dWtOZHNtVlVUQ0FVbURVZlFWcUN3b3BCQm1FSDNyL1Nwd0pLMUluZWZXeGliaU85bHY5VkZoRWNFN09jcEpxQ0t0bFJZaUE2SFU9S0/cVpac3NlMTVJK0FFTzJ3dCsvSFJQVXROU3VydkRPS1JPQm5nNDlRV25KajNhZkpuRjFQSUdFN1M0L09CcTBYelZuSzJTZHMyUXJSa2djUTVtNXB0TVE9PQS2 ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ecwKEXvFK/UlkyT3BZbktIdWk4Z1lxZ04zdWQ2NkhCVDkyd2lUZHk1dWtOZHNtVlVUQ0FVbURVZlFWcUN3b3BCQm1FSDNyL1Nwd0pLMUluZWZXeGliaU85bHY5VkZoRWNFN09jcEpxQ0t0bFJZaUE2SFU9S0/
