Hello Peter,2023 is an incredibly important year for the great state of Virginia. While most of the nation gets a break from elections, our state has elections for our House of Delegates and our State Senate.Yes, that’s right. Election season doesn’t stop here. **We have a job to do and time is of the essence.** As you know, two years ago we flipped Virginia. It was a massive ten-point swing and Governor Glenn Youngkin went straight to VICTORY.Now, we’re going to have to deliver a Republican House of Delegates & Senate to make sure that we can **TRULY** call ourselves a strong red state.We need to win not only for the sake of Virginians, but to change the momentum in this country going into 2024.Blac Republic, my leadership PAC, is going to focus exclusively on pushing great conservative candidates in Virginia for these races.**These are state races, so your money really does go a long way here.** So now I’m calling on you - we need to get our funds ready to truly boost REAL conservatives in primaries so that we’re not dealing with RINOs come the general election.Can I count on you today to help us boost these conservative candidates and help them lead us to victory?

So now I’m calling on you - we need to get our funds ready to truly boost REAL conservatives in primaries so that we’re not dealing with RINOs come the general election.Can I count on you today to help us boost these conservative candidates and help them lead us to victory? | | | | | Time to win and ensure that we are ready to make strong conservative changes.Let’s do it,Terry Namkung Founder, Blac Republic | Paid for by Blac Republic | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

body:

---
| | Democrats have already flipped our first crucial seat of the new year earlier this week – but we can’t stop now! There _are nearly a dozen_ special elections coming up including races in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire that could help determine chamber control: | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**
---|---|---
1/31 | Pennsylvania | S-27
2/7 | Pennsylvania | HD-32
2/7 | Pennsylvania | HD-34
2/7 | Pennsylvania | HD-35
2/21 | New Hampshire | H-Strafford 8
State Democrats had a once-in-a-generation election this November – and while Republicans didn’t think we could carry that momentum into the new year, we’ve proved them wrong!
**But winning special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire this year is critically important – a rare opportunity to build (or lose!) Democratic power in states that are only usually competitive in even years. That means we need to mobilize _right now._**
State Republicans outspent us in every quarter last year, so we need our whole grassroots team standing with us to defeat Republican extremists in these critical special elections.
[Will you rush a donation of $7, $25, or anything you can spare today to help state Democrats WIN in these competitive elections?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_T2zyTQu244Uf_Vel4qq1wxdfmheLTDcuAKS7BB9YfiXAarrAWQdtQJTJEA7OcaCyl1dymM24gHmRwmwA6j0fHxWOIBQOW0JtDDSvBpaR1ijL4vjFesTij3g16v3OliN1dhrkII3gxZ_a2xxamQBDNefAPCdQcfjifC1Nto0BGtshsF8aezbM7nIet7fBaBBcsXuZxvQNArpA9_CYWUkFtlLZkrh7bqJLDRR-8qtcWazmjwNvELgFBVkrOC-iKB6zP0eWg0t2eJZWkzMVsg4WYVY_SInTMVFkRbtugSrNlhAnJJA5WtYZMvaweRNdKi8jyRkyAhOuxSmjZ1D9N-zV2zOATGvipazgYR6YxxYRvGCvjxRGzxaslxEz4Cseh-bGoD6eJ85u0nlf2xOtAkiDON5Id_8kXrK1nmVY8mzVtw/3su/KYAlqhsXRi6iLscGPiEobg/h0/USQ19uiAHaFHrehhmuVTfuE4tJGo8UiGRRMjI2EIAbc)

subject: the House is a mess, Peter

body:
all of our priorities could get swept under the rug

| | It’s only been just over a week since the 118th, Republican-led Congress convened — and House Republicans are ALREADY attacking voting rights, immigration, and abortion.

We’re _urgently_ shaping our 2023 strategy to ensure that Democrats win BIG next year — _and House Republicans are stopped before they destroy everything!_

**So Peter, it’s _never_ been more important that we know where PA Democrats stand:**

| | Peter, Georgia is on everyone’s mind right now.

The DNC wants to move Georgia up as an early primary state in recognition of its importance as the key swing state of 2024.

DeSantis and Trump are scheming on ways to flip Georgia back to red if they win the GOP nomination.

And Joe Biden himself is in Atlanta this weekend!

But for how central Georgia will be to who wins the White House in 2024, we haven’t seen our grassroots team continue to back us like they did ahead of November’s election! **We need to open offices across the state, hire regional organizers, and make the investments that will allow us to narrow margins and boost turnout in critical counties and cities across Georgia.**

Peter, our first huge deadline of the 2024 cycle is tomorrow at midnight. We’ve got to show the DNC and Joe Biden that the Democratic Party of Georgia has what it takes to win the White House in 2024. clean_body: | | | Peter, Georgia is on everyone’s mind right now. The DNC wants to move Georgia up as an early primary state in recognition of its importance as the key swing state of 2024. DeSantis and Trump are scheming on ways to flip Georgia back to red if they win the GOP nomination. And Joe Biden himself is in Atlanta this weekend! But for how central Georgia will be to who wins the White House in 2024, we haven’t seen our grassroots team continue to back us like they did ahead of November’s election! We need to open offices across the state, hire regional organizers, and make the investments that will allow us to narrow margins and boost turnout in critical counties and cities across Georgia. Peter, our first huge deadline of the 2024 cycle is tomorrow at midnight. We’ve got to show the DNC and Joe Biden that the Democratic Party of Georgia has what it takes to win the White House in 2024. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = If we can prove that we have what it takes to build the scrappiest program in the entire country, then we know that the DNC will prioritize us and give us the resources we need to WIN._ Thank you for your continued support, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Team, I just wrapped up my first two weeks (and first week officially sworn-in as your Congressman) in Washington, and I’m finally getting settled in. After spending week one observing the chaotic fight for House Speaker amongst the far-right factions of the GOP, I was thrilled to finally get to work on behalf of the people of NM-02. I introduced my first bill to prevent House members from receiving pay until a speaker is elected in the future. I also voted against the extremists’ proposed rules package that would gut government ethics and oversight, further attack women’s reproductive choice, and give more tax breaks to wealthy corporations. Additionally, this rules package would set New Mexico up for failure by threatening critical defense funding, including funding for NM’s Holloman Air Force Base, and attacks Social Security and Medicare, hurting our seniors. **[New Mexico deserves better, and I’m going to keep fighting for it. Will you help rebuild our people-powered campaign’s resources by pitching in $10 or more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57338810/387603124/1850399781?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230114firstweek_gv_od60ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWRmZmE0Mi01ZTk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bbMe5tCXpjiXizLeAc8BMSvcy1CCuWz2_C6UoUCAJs=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:
we can’t keep up our critical work without meeting tonight’s goal, Peter

| Hello Peter! Upset The Setup has a clear and powerful mission: To elect young, diverse, and progressive Democrats up and down the ballot who will upset the system that is set up to keep them out of elected offices. name: NDRC Breaking News
subject: POLITICO: “Key battleground states are moving to change election laws ahead of ‘24”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
“the reforms could change how people vote in critical states.”
|
---

| **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57338971/387603687/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=20220114.1r&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4OTMyYzM3LTVmOTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0Vl7oTl1dlY54zfSsG3Y5hugoU4kQlS0g_CuoFUgR3g=)**
---
We have good news and bad news, team.
**First, the bad news: Attacks on voting rights are _escalating_.**
After the 2020 election, more than a dozen states passed new voter suppression laws. Then, the Supreme Court continued putting key provisions of the Voting Rights Act in jeopardy. Now, _more_ states are considering passing restrictions on voting in 2023. And, with the power of the House majority, Republicans can work to undermine voting rights at the national level as well.
**Now, the good news: The NDRC is fighting back – _and we’re getting results!_**
Our grassroots movement helped Democrats win key governors’ and new state legislative majorities in 2022. **Now, Democrats in states like Michigan are planning to use their power to _expand_ access to voting!**

But that’s not all. The NDRC is also continuing to support plaintiffs in lawsuits, support independent state courts, elect pro-democracy candidates, and end map manipulation that allows politicians to pick their voters instead of the other way around.
[**_The NDRC’s work to defend voting rights is powered by supporters like you. Will you help us defeat Republican attacks on voting rights with a donation of any amount today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57338972/387603688/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=20220114.1r&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4OTMyYzM3LTVmOTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0Vl7oTl1dlY54zfSsG3Y5hugoU4kQlS0g_CuoFUgR3g=)

clean_body: “the reforms could change how people vote in critical states.” | | = We have good news and bad news, team. First, the bad news: Attacks on voting rights are escalating. After the 2020 election, more than a dozen states passed new voter suppression laws. Then, the Supreme Court continued putting key provisions of the Voting Rights Act in jeopardy. Now, more states are considering passing restrictions on voting in 2023. And, with the power of the House majority, Republicans can work to undermine voting rights at the national level as well. Now, the good news: The NDRC is fighting back – and we’re getting results! Our grassroots movement helped Democrats win key governors’ and new state legislative majorities in 2022. Now, Democrats in states like Michigan are planning to use their power to expand access to voting! But that’s not all. The NDRC is also continuing to support plaintiffs in lawsuits, support independent state courts, elect pro-democracy candidates, and end map manipulation that allows politicians to pick their voters instead of the other way around. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Attorney General Eric Holder said, “Thanks to the tenacity of the people – people like you – fairness and democracy have been enhanced in our nation.” He’s right! This grassroots team has already helped us accomplish so much. Together, we‘re confident we can keep going and achieve even more victories for our democracy. We hope you’ll stick with us. – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: we may not have won without taking on debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
A few days before Election Day, POLITICO and other campaign experts were calling our race in New Hampshire a “toss up.”
| | |
---
Hello,

A few days before Election Day, POLITICO and other campaign experts were calling our race in New Hampshire a “toss up.”

We knew we could win, but it became clear in those final days that we were going to need to spend beyond our budget to hold on to this Senate seat.

Let me be clear: **taking on campaign debt was the right thing to do.** But now bills are due and we still need to raise the funds to close out our 2022 race once and for all.

**I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t important:[Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help us fill the gap? I’m hoping that I can count on your help before my team’s mid-month check-in on our debt status.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57339138/387604623/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2186-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGI2MTI2OC02Mzk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVigqQGFhx5zEpImw8yk3z3IBlkbLNJ86OboeEDBcfc=)**
Thanks to you, Democrats preserved the majority. You only have to look as far as House Republicans’ election for Speaker to know how chaotic the Senate would be if we had lost. So truly, thank you.

_Especially_ since Republicans have the House majority, I need to continue to spend my time working for Granite Staters, not fundraising. Emails like this save me a ton of time - but only if folks like you donate. **[Will you please help out with $3 or whatever you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57339139/387604624/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2186-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGI2MTI2OC02Mzk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVigqQGFhx5zEpImw8yk3z3IBlkbLNJ86OboeEDBcfc=)**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

subject: re: George Santos
